content.text: 让我先看关键文件——首页（粘贴链接的地方）和转录相关的代码。

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.service
     2→
     3→import android.app.Notification
     4→import android.app.NotificationChannel
     5→import android.app.NotificationManager
     6→import android.app.PendingIntent
     7→import android.app.Service
     8→import android.content.Context
     9→import android.content.Intent
    10→import android.os.Binder
    11→import android.os.Build
    12→import android.os.IBinder
    13→import android.util.Log
    14→import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
    15→import com.multilanglearner.R
    16→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    17→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.WhisperResult
    18→import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
    19→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
    20→import com.multilanglearner.domain.util.VttParser
    21→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.*
    23→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    24→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    25→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
    26→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
    27→import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.ListSerializer
    28→import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
    29→import java.io.File
    30→import javax.inject.Inject
    31→
    32→/**
    33→ * 转录前台服务
    34→ * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
    35→ */
    36→@AndroidEntryPoint
    37→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    38→    companion object {
    39→        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
    40→        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    41→        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
    42→        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    43→
    44→        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    45→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    46→        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"
    47→
    48→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
    49→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"
    50→
    51→        // 进度广播
    52→        const val ACTION_PROGRESS = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_PROGRESS"
    53→        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"
    54→        const val EXTRA_TOTAL = "total"
    55→        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"
    56→        const val EXTRA_MESSAGE = "message"
    57→        const val EXTRA_REMAINING = "remaining"
    58→
    59→        // 队列状态广播（新增）
    60→        const val ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_QUEUE_UPDATE"
    61→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE = "queue_size"
    62→        const val EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO = "current_video"
    63→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST = "queue_list" // JSON array of video names
    64→
    65→        // 完成广播
    66→        const val ACTION_COMPLETED = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_COMPLETED"
    67→        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
    68→        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"
    69→        const val EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT = "subtitle_count"
    70→        const val EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG = "detected_lang"
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    @Inject
    74→    lateinit var ffmpegSegmentedService: FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    75→
    76→    @Inject
    77→    lateinit var aiConfigStore: AIConfigStore
    78→
    79→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + Job())
    80→    private var currentJob: Job? = null
    81→
    82→    // 转录队列
    83→    private val transcriptionQueue = mutableMapOf<String, Pair<String, String>>() // id -> (videoPath, videoName)
    84→    private var currentTranscriptionId: String? = null
    85→
    86→    // 服务状态
    87→    private val _serviceState = MutableStateFlow<ServiceState>(ServiceState.Idle)
    88→    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()
    89→
    90→    private val binder = LocalBinder()
    91→
    92→    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
    93→        fun getService(): TranscriptionService = this@TranscriptionService
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder = binder
    97→
    98→    override fun onCreate() {
    99→        super.onCreate()
   100→        Log.d(TAG, "Service created")
   101→        createNotificationChannel()
   102→    }
   103→
   104→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
   105→        when (intent?.action) {
   106→            ACTION_START -> {
   107→                val videoPath = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH)
   108→                val videoName = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME) ?: "视频"
   109→                if (videoPath != null) {
   110→                    startTranscription(videoPath, videoName)
   111→                }
   112→            }
   113→            ACTION_CANCEL -> {
   114→                cancelTranscription()
   115→            }
   116→        }
   117→        return START_STICKY
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    /**
   121→     * 开始转录
   122→     */
   123→    private fun startTranscription(videoPath: String, videoName: String) {
   124→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription for: $videoPath")
   125→
   126→        val transcriptionId = System.currentTimeMillis().toString()
   127→
   128→        // 如果当前有转录任务在运行，加入队列
   129→        if (currentJob?.isActive == true) {
   130→            Log.w(TAG, "Transcription already running, adding to queue: $videoName")
   131→            transcriptionQueue[transcriptionId] = Pair(videoPath, videoName)
   132→            // 更新通知显示队列状态（通过 updateProgress）
   133→            updateProgress(videoName, 0, 0, 0, "队列中 (${transcriptionQueue.size} 等待)")
   134→            return
   135→        }
   136→
   137→        // 开始执行转录
   138→        executeTranscription(transcriptionId, videoPath, videoName)
   139→    }
   140→
   141→    /**
   142→     * 执行转录任务
   143→     */
   144→    private fun executeTranscription(
   145→        transcriptionId: String,
   146→        videoPath: String,
   147→        videoName: String
   148→    ) {
   149→        currentTranscriptionId = transcriptionId
   150→
   151→        // 启动前台服务
   152→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   153→
   154→        currentJob = serviceScope.launch {
   155→            try {
   156→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   157→
   158→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   159→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   160→
   161→                // 检查 API Key
   162→                val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   163→                                 (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   164→
   165→                if (!hasGroqKey) {
   166→                    sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   167→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   168→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   169→                    stopSelf()
   170→                    return@launch
   171→                }
   172→
   173→                // 执行转录 - 使用用户指定的转录语言（如果设置了）
   174→                val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   175→                val result = ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   176→                    videoFile,
   177→                    config,
   178→                    transcribeLang,
   179→                    onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   180→                        updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   181→                        sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   182→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   183→                            segment, total, progress, message
   184→                        )
   185→                    }
   186→                )
   187→
   188→                // 转录完成
   189→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   190→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   191→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   192→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   193→
   194→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   195→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   196→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   197→                    }
   198→
   199→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text)
   200→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   201→                        result.detectedLang,
   202→                        result.text
   203→                    )
   204→
   205→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   206→                    delay(3000) // 显示完成通知3秒
   207→
   208→                    // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   209→                    currentTranscriptionId = null
   210→                    processNextInQueue()
   211→
   212→                } else {
   213→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   214→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   215→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   216→
   217→                    // 失败后也处理队列中的下一个任务
   218→                    currentTranscriptionId = null
   219→                    processNextInQueue()
   220→                }
   221→
   222→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   223→                Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   224→                val error = "转录失败: ${e.message}"
   225→                sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   226→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   227→
   228→                // 异常后也处理队列中的下一个任务
   229→                currentTranscriptionId = null
   230→                processNextInQueue()
   231→            }
   232→        }
   233→    }
   234→
   235→    /**
   236→     * 处理队列中的下一个转录任务
   237→     */
   238→    private fun processNextInQueue() {
   239→        if (transcriptionQueue.isEmpty()) {
   240→            // 队列为空，停止服务
   241→            stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   242→            stopSelf()
   243→            return
   244→        }
   245→
   246→        // 取出队列中的第一个任务
   247→        val (nextId, nextTask) = transcriptionQueue.entries.first()
   248→        transcriptionQueue.remove(nextId)
   249→
   250→        val (nextPath, nextName) = nextTask
   251→        Log.d(TAG, "Processing next in queue: $nextName (${transcriptionQueue.size} remaining)")
   252→
   253→        // 执行下一个转录任务
   254→        executeTranscription(nextId, nextPath, nextName)
   255→    }
   256→
   257→    /**
   258→     * 取消转录
   259→     */
   260→    private fun cancelTranscription() {
   261→        currentJob?.cancel()
   262→        currentJob = null
   263→        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Idle
   264→        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   265→        stopSelf()
   266→        Log.d(TAG, "Transcription cancelled")
   267→    }
   268→
   269→    /**
   270→     * 保存字幕文件
   271→     */
   272→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   273→        result: WhisperResult,
   274→        vttPath: String,
   275→        wtsPath: String
   276→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   277→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   278→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   279→
   280→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   281→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   282→            for (wt in result.words) {
   283→                curWords.add(wt)
   284→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   285→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   286→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   287→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   288→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   289→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   290→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   291→                }
   292→            }
   293→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   294→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   295→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   296→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   297→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   298→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   299→            }
   300→        }
   301→
   302→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   303→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   304→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   305→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   306→        }
   307→
   308→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   309→    }
   310→
   311→    private fun updateProgress(videoName: String, segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String) {
   312→        val notification = createProgressNotification(videoName, segment, total, message)
   313→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   314→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   315→    }
   316→
   317→    private fun updateNotificationComplete(videoName: String) {
   318→        val notification = createCompleteNotification(videoName)
   319→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   320→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   321→    }
   322→
   323→    private fun sendProgressBroadcast(segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String, remaining: Long) {
   324→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_PROGRESS).apply {
   325→            putExtra(EXTRA_SEGMENT, segment)
   326→            putExtra(EXTRA_TOTAL, total)
   327→            putExtra(EXTRA_PROGRESS, progress)
   328→            putExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE, message)
   329→            putExtra(EXTRA_REMAINING, remaining)
   330→        }
   331→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   332→
   333→        // 同时发送队列状态广播
   334→        sendQueueUpdateBroadcast()
   335→    }
   336→
   337→    /**
   338→     * 发送队列状态广播
   339→     */
   340→    private fun sendQueueUpdateBroadcast() {
   341→        val queueList = transcriptionQueue.values.map { it.second }.toTypedArray()
   342→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE).apply {
   343→            putExtra(EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE, transcriptionQueue.size)
   344→            putExtra(EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO, currentTranscriptionId)
   345→            putExtra(EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST, queueList)
   346→        }
   347→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   348→    }
   349→
   350→    private fun sendCompletedBroadcast(success: Boolean, detectedLang: String, text: String) {
   351→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   352→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, success)
   353→            putExtra(EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG, detectedLang)
   354→            // 计算字幕数量（粗略估计：按句子分割）
   355→            val subtitleCount = text.split(Regex("[.!?。！？]")).filter { it.isNotBlank() }.size
   356→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT, subtitleCount)
   357→        }
   358→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   359→    }
   360→
   361→    private fun sendErrorBroadcast(error: String) {
   362→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   363→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, false)
   364→            putExtra(EXTRA_ERROR, error)
   365→        }
   366→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   367→    }

   369→    /**
   370→     * 创建通知渠道
   371→     */
   372→    private fun createNotificationChannel() {
   373→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
   374→            val channel = NotificationChannel(
   375→                CHANNEL_ID,
   376→                CHANNEL_NAME,
   377→                NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_LOW
   378→            ).apply {
   379→                description = "显示视频转录进度"
   380→                setShowBadge(false)
   381→            }
   382→            val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
   383→            notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
   384→        }
   385→    }
   386→
   387→    /**
   388→     * 创建进度通知
   389→     */
   390→    private fun createProgressNotification(
   391→        videoName: String,
   392→        segment: Int,
   393→        total: Int,
   394→        message: String
   395→    ): Notification {
   396→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   397→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   398→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   399→        }
   400→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   401→            this, 0, openIntent,
   402→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   403→        )
   404→
   405→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   406→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   407→        }
   408→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   409→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   410→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   411→        )
   412→
   413→        val progressText = if (total > 1) {
   414→            "分段 $segment/$total ($message)"
   415→        } else {
   416→            message
   417→        }
   418→
   419→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   420→            .setContentTitle("正在转录: $videoName")
   421→            .setContentText(progressText)
   422→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   423→            .setOngoing(true)
   424→            .setAutoCancel(false)
   425→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   426→            .addAction(android.R.drawable.ic_menu_close_clear_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   427→            .setProgress(total, segment, false)
   428→            .build()
   429→    }
   430→
   431→    /**
   432→     * 创建完成通知
   433→     */
   434→    private fun createCompleteNotification(videoName: String): Notification {
   435→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   436→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   437→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   438→        }
   439→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   440→            this, 0, openIntent,
   441→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   442→        )
   443→
   444→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   445→            .setContentTitle("转录完成")
   446→            .setContentText("$videoName 已完成转录")
   447→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   448→            .setOngoing(false)
   449→            .setAutoCancel(true)
   450→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   451→            .build()
   452→    }
   453→
   454→    override fun onDestroy() {
   455→        super.onDestroy()
   456→        currentJob?.cancel()
   457→        serviceScope.cancel()
   458→        Log.d(TAG, "Service destroyed")
   459→    }
   460→}

   143→

   176→    /**
   177→     * 下载视频 - 支持 B站、YouTube 等平台
   178→     * 支持最多3个并发下载
   179→     */
   180→    fun downloadVideo(onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   181→        val url = _uiState.value.url.trim()
   182→
   183→        if (url.isBlank()) {
   184→            // 不再使用 currentDownload，直接在 activeDownloads 中添加错误任务
   185→            return
   186→        }
   187→
   188→        // 检查是否已存在相同视频（通过 URL 匹配）
   189→        val existingVideo = _uiState.value.videos.find { it.sourceUrl == url }
   190→        if (existingVideo != null) {
   191→            // 显示重复下载确认对话框
   192→            _uiState.update { it.copy(
   193→                showDuplicateDownloadConfirm = true,
   194→                duplicateVideoTitle = existingVideo.title
   195→            )}
   196→            return
   197→        }
   198→
   199→        // 如果已达最大并发数，加入队列
   200→        if (activeDownloadTasks.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS) {
   201→            addToQueue(url)
   202→            return
   203→        }
   204→
   205→        startDownload(url, onComplete)
   206→    }
   207→

   213→        val url = _uiState.value.url.trim()
   214→
   215→        // 如果已达最大并发数，加入队列
   216→        if (activeDownloadTasks.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS) {
   217→            addToQueue(url)
   218→            return
   219→        }
   220→
   221→        startDownload(url, onComplete)
   222→    }

   233→
   234→    /**
   235→     * 开始下载
   236→     */
   237→    private fun startDownload(url: String, onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   238→        lateinit var job: Job
   239→        job = viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   240→            // 创建下载任务
   241→            val task = DownloadTask(
   242→                url = url,
   243→                title = "正在解析...",
   244→                status = DownloadStatus.FETCHING_INFO
   245→            )
   246→
   247→            try {
   248→                // 添加到活跃下载
   249→                activeDownloadTasks[task.id] = task
   250→                // 保存当前 job 到 Map（需要在协程启动后）
   251→                activeDownloadJobs[task.id] = job
   252→                updateActiveDownloads()
   253→
   254→                // 获取视频信息
   255→                val result = videoDownloadService.getVideoInfo(url)
   256→
   257→                result.onSuccess { videoInfo ->
   258→                    // 检查是否需要Cookie但未配置
   259→                    val needsCookie = when (videoInfo.platform) {
   260→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> true
   261→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> false  // YouTube通常不需要Cookie
   262→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> false  // 抖音使用API解析
   263→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> false  // TikTok使用API解析
   264→                        else -> false
   265→                    }
   266→
   267→                    val hasCookie = when (videoInfo.platform) {
   268→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> videoDownloadService.hasBilibiliCookie()
   269→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> videoDownloadService.hasYouTubeCookie()
   270→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> videoDownloadService.hasDouyinCookie()
   271→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> videoDownloadService.hasTiktokCookie()
   272→                        else -> true
   273→                    }
   274→
   275→                    if (needsCookie && !hasCookie) {
   276→                        // 需要登录获取Cookie，根据平台显示不同的登录对话框
   277→                        // 先添加一个等待认证的任务到 activeDownloads
   278→                        val waitingTask = task.copy(
   279→                            title = "需要登录",
   280→                            status = DownloadStatus.WAITING_FOR_AUTH
   281→                        )
   282→                        activeDownloadTasks[task.id] = waitingTask
   283→                        updateActiveDownloads()
   284→
   285→                        when (videoInfo.platform) {
   286→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> {
   287→                                _uiState.update {
   288→                                    it.copy(
   289→                                        showBilibiliLogin = true,
   290→                                        pendingDownloadUrl = url
   291→                                    )
   292→                                }
   293→                            }
   294→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> {
   295→                                _uiState.update {
   296→                                    it.copy(
   297→                                        showYouTubeLogin = true,
   298→                                        pendingDownloadUrl = url
   299→                                    )
   300→                                }
   301→                            }
   302→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> {
   303→                                _uiState.update {
   304→                                    it.copy(
   305→                                        showDouyinLogin = true,
   306→                                        pendingDownloadUrl = url
   307→                                    )
   308→                                }
   309→                            }
   310→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> {
   311→                                _uiState.update {
   312→                                    it.copy(
   313→                                        showTiktokLogin = true,
   314→                                        pendingDownloadUrl = url
   315→                                    )
   316→                                }
   317→                            }
   318→                            else -> { /* 不应该到达这里 */ }
   319→                        }
   320→                        return@launch
   321→                    }
   322→
   323→                    // 更新任务信息并显示在 activeDownloads 中
   324→                    val updatedTask = task.copy(
   325→                        title = videoInfo.title,
   326→                        status = DownloadStatus.DOWNLOADING
   327→                    )
   328→                    activeDownloadTasks[task.id] = updatedTask
   329→                    updateActiveDownloads()
   330→
   331→                    // 生成文件名
   332→                    val safeTitle = videoInfo.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   333→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.mp4")
   334→
   335→                    // 使用分段下载器下载，传递Cookie和taskId
   336→                    downloadWithSegmentedDownloader(task.id, url, videoInfo, safeTitle, outputFile, onComplete)
   337→                }.onFailure { error ->
   338→                    val failedTask = task.copy(
   339→                        status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   340→                        errorMessage = "解析失败: ${error.message}\n\n建议：使用导入功能添加本地视频",
   341→                        errorCode = error.javaClass.simpleName
   342→                    )
   343→                    onDownloadFailed(task.id, failedTask, failedTask.errorMessage ?: "解析失败")
   344→                }
   345→
   346→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   347→                android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Download failed", e)
   348→                val failedTask = task.copy(
   349→                    status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   350→                    errorMessage = "下载失败: ${e.message}",
   351→                    errorCode = e.javaClass.simpleName
   352→                )
   353→                onDownloadFailed(task.id, failedTask, failedTask.errorMessage ?: "下载失败")
   354→            }
   355→        }
   356→    }
   357→
   358→    /**
   359→     * 使用分段下载器下载视频
   360→     */
   361→    private suspend fun downloadWithSegmentedDownloader(
   362→        taskId: String,
   363→        url: String,
   364→        videoInfo: com.multilanglearner.data.network.VideoDownloadService.VideoDownloadInfo,
   365→        title: String,
   366→        outputFile: File,
   367→        onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit
   368→    ) {
   369→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   370→        var lastUpdate = startTime
   371→
   372→        try {
   373→            val config = SegmentedDownloader.DownloadConfig(
   374→                url = videoInfo.downloadUrl,
   375→                outputFile = outputFile,
   376→                enableResume = true,
   377→                // 使用当前配置的Cookie（如果可用）
   378→                cookies = currentBilibiliCookie ?: videoInfo.cookies,
   379→                // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
   380→                audioUrl = videoInfo.audioUrl,
   381→                onProgress = { progress ->
   382→                    val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   383→                    // 限制更新频率（每200ms更新一次）
   384→                    if (now - lastUpdate > 200) {
   385→                        val elapsedSeconds = (now - startTime) / 1000.0
   386→                        val speed = progress.speed
   387→                        val remainingBytes = progress.totalBytes - progress.bytesDownloaded
   388→                        val remainingTime = if (speed > 0) remainingBytes / speed else 0L
   389→
   390→                        // 直接使用 taskId 更新对应的任务进度
   391→                        val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   392→                        if (currentTask != null) {
   393→                            val updatedTask = currentTask.copy(
   394→                                status = DownloadStatus.DOWNLOADING,
   395→                                progress = progress.percent,
   396→                                bytesDownloaded = progress.bytesDownloaded,
   397→                                totalBytes = progress.totalBytes,
   398→                                speed = speed,
   399→                                remainingTime = remainingTime,
   400→                                title = currentTask.title ?: title
   401→                            )
   402→                            updateActiveDownloadTask(taskId, updatedTask)
   403→                        }
   404→                        lastUpdate = now
   405→                    }
   406→                }
   407→            )
   408→
   409→            val result = segmentedDownloader.download(config)
   410→
   411→            result.onSuccess { file ->
   412→                // 直接使用传入的 taskId
   413→                val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   414→                if (currentTask != null) {
   415→                    val completedTask = currentTask.copy(
   416→                        status = DownloadStatus.COMPLETED,
   417→                        progress = 100,
   418→                        completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
   419→                    )
   420→                    onDownloadCompleted(taskId, completedTask, file, onComplete)
   421→                }
   422→            }.onFailure { error ->
   423→                // 直接使用传入的 taskId
   424→                val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   425→                if (currentTask != null) {
   426→                    onDownloadFailed(taskId, currentTask, "下载失败: ${error.message}")
   427→                }
   428→            }
   429→
   430→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   431→            android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Segmented download failed", e)
   432→            // 这里不需要额外处理，因为 onFailure 已经处理了
   433→        }
   434→    }
   435→
   436→    /**
   437→     * 取消当前下载
   438→     */
   439→    fun cancelDownload(taskId: String? = null) {
   440→        if (taskId != null) {
   441→            // 取消特定任务 - 直接删除，不保留记录
   442→            activeDownloadJobs[taskId]?.cancel()
   443→            activeDownloadTasks[taskId]?.let { task ->
   444→                activeDownloadTasks.remove(taskId)
   445→                activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   446→                updateActiveDownloads()
   447→
   448→                // 清理临时文件
   449→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   450→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   451→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   452→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   453→                }
   454→            }
   455→            // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   456→            processQueue()
   457→        } else {
   458→            // 取消所有任务 - 直接删除，不保留记录
   459→            activeDownloadJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   460→            activeDownloadTasks.values.forEach { task ->
   461→                // 清理临时文件
   462→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   463→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   464→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   465→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   466→                }
   467→            }
   468→            activeDownloadJobs.clear()
   469→            activeDownloadTasks.clear()
   470→            updateActiveDownloads()
   471→        }
   472→    }

   602→    /**
   603→     * 打开应用文件夹（视频下载目录）
   604→     */
   605→    fun openFileLocation(filePath: String, context: Context) {
   606→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   607→            try {
   608→                // 打开应用的视频下载目录
   609→                val videosDir = downloadsDir
   610→
   611→                if (!videosDir.exists()) {
   612→                    videosDir.mkdirs()
   613→                }
   614→
   615→                android.util.Log.d("HomeViewModel", "Opening folder: ${videosDir.absolutePath}")
   616→
   617→                // 使用 Intent 打开文件管理器
   618→                val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
   619→                    val uri = androidx.core.content.FileProvider.getUriForFile(
   620→                        context,
   621→                        "${context.packageName}.fileprovider",
   622→                        videosDir
   623→                    )
   624→                    setDataAndType(uri, "resource/folder")
   625→                    addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
   626→                    addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
   627→                }
   628→
   629→                try {
   630→                    context.startActivity(intent)
   631→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   632→                    android.util.Log.w("HomeViewModel", "Failed to open folder with file manager", e)
   633→                    // 如果失败，尝试使用 ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT
   634→                    val fallbackIntent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT).apply {
   635→                        addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
   636→                        type = "*/*"
   637→                        putExtra(DocumentsContract.EXTRA_INITIAL_URI,
   638→                            androidx.core.content.FileProvider.getUriForFile(
   639→                                context,
   640→                                "${context.packageName}.fileprovider",
   641→                                videosDir
   642→                            )
   643→                        )
   644→                    }
   645→                    context.startActivity(fallbackIntent)
   646→                }
   647→
   648→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   649→                    android.widget.Toast.makeText(
   650→                        context,
   651→                        "文件夹: ${videosDir.absolutePath}",
   652→                        android.widget.Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
   653→                    ).show()
   654→                }
   655→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   656→                android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Error opening folder", e)
   657→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   658→                    android.widget.Toast.makeText(
   659→                        context,
   660→                        "无法打开文件夹: ${e.message}",
   661→                        android.widget.Toast.LENGTH_LONG
   662→                    ).show()
   663→                }
   664→            }
   665→        }
   666→    }

   782→    /**
   783→     * 下载完成回调
   784→     */
   785→    private fun onDownloadCompleted(taskId: String, task: DownloadTask, file: File, onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   786→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   787→            // 移除活跃任务
   788→            activeDownloadTasks.remove(taskId)
   789→            activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   790→            updateActiveDownloads()
   791→
   792→            // 保存到数据库（移到已下载列表）
   793→            val entity = VideoEntity(
   794→                title = task.title,
   795→                filePath = file.absolutePath,
   796→                vttPath = null,
   797→                language = _uiState.value.selectedLang,
   798→                sourceUrl = task.url
   799→            )
   800→            videoRepository.insert(entity)
   801→
   802→            // 添加到历史记录（用于查看下载历史）
   803→            val history = DownloadHistory(
   804→                id = task.id,
   805→                title = task.title,
   806→                url = task.url,
   807→                filePath = file.absolutePath,
   808→                fileSize = file.length(),
   809→                status = DownloadStatus.COMPLETED,
   810→                createdAt = task.createdAt,
   811→                completedAt = task.completedAt
   812→            )
   813→            addToHistory(history)
   814→
   815→            withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   816→                // 不自动导航到播放器，不自动转录
   817→                // onComplete(file.absolutePath, null)
   818→                // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   819→                processQueue()
   820→            }
   821→        }
   822→    }

   824→    /**
   825→     * 下载失败回调
   826→     */
   827→    private fun onDownloadFailed(taskId: String, task: DownloadTask, error: String) {
   828→        // 移除活跃任务
   829→        activeDownloadTasks.remove(taskId)
   830→        activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   831→        updateActiveDownloads()
   832→
   833→        val failedTask = task.copy(
   834→            status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   835→            errorMessage = error
   836→        )
   837→        addToHistory(failedTask)
   838→
   839→        // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   840→        processQueue()
   841→    }

   843→    /**
   844→     * 处理下载队列
   845→     */
   846→    private fun processQueue() {
   847→        if (downloadQueue.isEmpty()) return
   848→        if (activeDownloadTasks.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS) return
   849→
   850→        // 从队列中取出任务
   851→        val (taskId, task) = downloadQueue.entries.first()
   852→        downloadQueue.remove(taskId)
   853→        updateQueueList()
   854→
   855→        // 开始下载
   856→        startDownload(task.url) { _, _ -> }
   857→    }

   867→            filePath = "", // 下载失败时没有文件路径
   868→            fileSize = task.totalBytes,
   869→            status = task.status,
   870→            createdAt = task.createdAt,
   871→            completedAt = task.completedAt
   872→        )
   873→        val updated = listOf(history) + _downloadHistory.value
   874→        _downloadHistory.update { updated }

   922→    /**
   923→     * 格式化文件大小
   924→     */
   925→    fun formatFileSize(bytes: Long): String {
   926→        return when {
   927→            bytes < 1024 -> "$bytes B"
   928→            bytes < 1024 * 1024 -> "${bytes / 1024} KB"
   929→            bytes < 1024 * 1024 * 1024 -> "${bytes / (1024 * 1024)} MB"
   930→            else -> String.format("%.1f GB", bytes / (1024.0 * 1024 * 1024))
   931→        }
   932→    }
   933→
   934→    /**
   935→     * 格式化下载速度
   936→     */
   937→    fun formatSpeed(bytesPerSecond: Long): String {
   938→        return when {
   939→            bytesPerSecond < 1024 -> "${bytesPerSecond} B/s"
   940→            bytesPerSecond < 1024 * 1024 -> "${bytesPerSecond / 1024} KB/s"
   941→            else -> String.format("%.1f MB/s", bytesPerSecond / (1024.0 * 1024))
   942→        }
   943→    }
   944→
   945→    /**
   946→     * 格式化剩余时间
   947→     */
   948→    fun formatRemainingTime(seconds: Long): String {
   949→        return when {
   950→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   951→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   952→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   953→        }
   954→    }
   955→
   956→    /**
   957→     * 获取状态文本
   958→     */
   959→    fun getStatusText(status: DownloadStatus): String {
   960→        return when (status) {
   961→            DownloadStatus.PENDING -> "等待中"
   962→            DownloadStatus.FETCHING_INFO -> "解析中..."
   963→            DownloadStatus.DOWNLOADING -> "下载中"
   964→            DownloadStatus.PAUSED -> "已暂停"
   965→            DownloadStatus.COMPLETED -> "已完成"
   966→            DownloadStatus.FAILED -> "失败"
   967→            DownloadStatus.CANCELLED -> "已取消"
   968→            DownloadStatus.WAITING_FOR_AUTH -> "需要登录"
   969→        }
   970→    }

   972→    fun importVideo(context: Context, uri: Uri, onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   973→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   974→            try {
   975→                _uiState.update { it.copy(isProcessing = true) }
   976→
   977→                val fileName = getFileName(context, uri) ?: "import_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.mp4"
   978→                android.util.Log.d("HomeViewModel", "Import video fileName: $fileName")
   979→
   980→                val tempFile = File(downloadsDir, fileName)
   981→
   982→                // 使用原始文件名（不含扩展名）作为标题，而不是时间戳格式
   983→                val displayName = if (fileName.startsWith("import_")) {
   984→                    // 如果是默认文件名，尝试从 Uri 获取更友好的名称
   985→                    val lastPath = uri.lastPathSegment ?: "导入视频"
   986→                    lastPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   987→                } else {
   988→                    // 使用原始文件名（去掉扩展名）
   989→                    fileName.substringBeforeLast(".")
   990→                }
   991→
   992→                android.util.Log.d("HomeViewModel", "Import video displayName: $displayName")
   993→
   994→                val inputStream = context.contentResolver.openInputStream(uri)
   995→                val outputStream = FileOutputStream(tempFile)
   996→
   997→                inputStream?.use { input ->
   998→                    outputStream.use { output ->
   999→                        input.copyTo(output)
  1000→                    }
  1001→                }
  1002→
  1003→                val entity = VideoEntity(
  1004→                    title = displayName,
  1005→                    filePath = tempFile.absolutePath,
  1006→                    vttPath = null,
  1007→                    language = _uiState.value.selectedLang,
  1008→                    sourceUrl = null
  1009→                )
  1010→                videoRepository.insert(entity)
  1011→
  1012→                // 添加到历史记录
  1013→                val history = DownloadHistory(
  1014→                    id = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
  1015→                    title = displayName,
  1016→                    url = "导入文件",
  1017→                    filePath = tempFile.absolutePath,
  1018→                    fileSize = tempFile.length(),
  1019→                    status = DownloadStatus.COMPLETED,
  1020→                    createdAt = System.currentTimeMillis(),
  1021→                    completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
  1022→                )
  1023→                addToHistory(history)
  1024→
  1025→                _uiState.update { it.copy(isProcessing = false) }
  1026→                launch(Dispatchers.Main) { onComplete(tempFile.absolutePath, null) }
  1027→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1028→                android.util.Log.e("MultiLangLearner", "Import failed", e)
  1029→                _uiState.update { it.copy(isProcessing = false) }
  1030→            }
  1031→        }
  1032→    }

  1034→    private fun getFileName(context: Context, uri: Uri): String? {
  1035→        var result: String? = null
  1036→        if (uri.scheme == "content") {
  1037→            val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(uri, null, null, null, null)
  1038→            cursor?.use {
  1039→                if (it.moveToFirst()) {
  1040→                    val index = it.getColumnIndex(android.provider.OpenableColumns.DISPLAY_NAME)
  1041→                    if (index >= 0) result = it.getString(index)
  1042→                }
  1043→            }
  1044→        }
  1045→        if (result == null) {
  1046→            result = uri.path
  1047→            val cut = result?.lastIndexOf('/')
  1048→            if (cut != -1) {
  1049→                result = result?.substring(cut!! + 1)
  1050→            }
  1051→        }
  1052→        return result
  1053→    }

  1065→    ) {
  1066→        viewModelScope.launch {

  1071→                buildString {

  1073→                    biliJct?.let { append("bili_jct=$it; ") }
  1074→                    dedeUserID?.let { append("DedeUserID=$it; ") }
  1075→                }.trimEnd(' ', ';')
  1076→            }
  1077→
  1078→            // 保存Cookie到配置
  1079→            if (sessdata != null) {
  1080→                videoConfigStore.setBilibiliSessdata(sessdata)
  1081→            }
  1082→            if (biliJct != null) {
  1083→                videoConfigStore.setBilibiliBiliJct(biliJct)
  1084→            }
  1085→            if (dedeUserID != null) {
  1086→                videoConfigStore.setBilibiliDedeuserid(dedeUserID)
  1087→            }
  1088→
  1089→            // 立即更新当前Cookie变量（使用完整Cookie）
  1090→            if (cookieString.isNotBlank()) {
  1091→                currentBilibiliCookie = cookieString
  1092→                Log.d("HomeViewModel", "Updated Bilibili cookie, length: ${cookieString.length}")
  1093→            }
  1094→
  1095→            // 关闭登录对话框
  1096→            _uiState.update { it.copy(showBilibiliLogin = false) }
  1097→
  1098→            // 如果有待处理的URL，继续下载
  1099→            val pendingUrl = _uiState.value.pendingDownloadUrl
  1100→            if (pendingUrl.isNotBlank()) {
  1101→                // 清除待处理URL
  1102→                _uiState.update { it.copy(pendingDownloadUrl = "") }
  1103→
  1104→                // 继续下载

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.async
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.awaitAll
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.coroutineScope
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout
    11→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    12→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    13→import okhttp3.Request
    14→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    15→import org.json.JSONObject
    16→import java.io.IOException
    17→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    18→import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap
    19→
    20→/**
    21→ * 视频下载服务 - 使用在线 API 解析视频
    22→ * 支持多平台：B站、抖音、YouTube、TikTok 等
    23→ *
    24→ * 改进点：
    25→ * - 参考 Electron 版本的平台检测和视频提取逻辑
    26→ * - 改进 B站、抖音的解析逻辑，支持多种备用 API
    27→ * - 添加 YouTube 支持（使用 yt-dlp API 或备用方案）
    28→ * - 改进错误处理和重试机制
    29→ * - 添加详细的日志输出
    30→ * - 支持Cookie认证（解决403问题）
    31→ */
    32→class VideoDownloadService(
    33→    private val bilibiliCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    34→    private val youtubeCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    35→    private val douyinCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    36→    private val tiktokCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null
    37→) {
    38→
    39→    companion object {
    40→        private const val TAG = "VideoDownloadService"
    41→        private const val DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30_000L
    42→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 1000L
    44→
    45→        // API 健康检查缓存
    46→        private val apiHealthCache = ConcurrentHashMap<String, ApiHealthStatus>()
    47→        private const val HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION = 5 * 60 * 1000L // 5分钟
    48→
    49→        /**
    50→         * API 健康状态数据类
    51→         */
    52→        data class ApiHealthStatus(
    53→            val isAvailable: Boolean,
    54→            val responseTime: Long,
    55→            val lastCheckTime: Long,
    56→            val errorMessage: String? = null
    57→        )
    58→
    59→        /**
    60→         * 检查 API 健康状态
    61→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    62→         * @return 如果缓存有效且 API 可用返回 true，否则返回 true（默认可用，需实际检测）
    63→         */
    64→        fun isApiHealthy(apiUrl: String): Boolean {
    65→            val cached = apiHealthCache[apiUrl]
    66→            if (cached != null && System.currentTimeMillis() - cached.lastCheckTime < HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION) {
    67→                return cached.isAvailable
    68→            }
    69→            return true // 没有缓存时默认可用
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        /**
    73→         * 更新 API 健康状态
    74→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    75→         * @param isAvailable 是否可用
    76→         * @param responseTime 响应时间（毫秒）
    77→         * @param error 错误信息（可选）
    78→         */
    79→        fun updateApiHealth(apiUrl: String, isAvailable: Boolean, responseTime: Long = 0, error: String? = null) {
    80→            apiHealthCache[apiUrl] = ApiHealthStatus(isAvailable, responseTime, System.currentTimeMillis(), error)
    81→            Log.d(TAG, "API health updated: $apiUrl -> available=$isAvailable, responseTime=${responseTime}ms")
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        /**
    85→         * 获取最佳 API（按响应时间排序，优先使用最快的可用 API）
    86→         * @param apis API 配置列表
    87→         * @param getUrl 从配置中获取 URL 的函数
    88→         * @return 排序后的 API 列表
    89→         */
    90→        fun <T> getBestApi(apis: List<T>, getUrl: (T) -> String): List<T> {
    91→            return apis.sortedBy { api ->
    92→                val url = getUrl(api)
    93→                val status = apiHealthCache[url]
    94→                if (status == null) 0L else if (status.isAvailable) status.responseTime else Long.MAX_VALUE
    95→            }
    96→        }
    97→
    98→        /**
    99→         * 清除过期的健康检查缓存
   100→         */
   101→        fun clearExpiredHealthCache() {
   102→            val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   103→            apiHealthCache.entries.removeIf { now - it.value.lastCheckTime > HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION }
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        /**
   107→         * 获取所有 API 的健康状态（用于调试）
   108→         */
   109→        fun getApiHealthStats(): Map<String, ApiHealthStatus> {
   110→            return apiHealthCache.toMap()
   111→        }
   112→    }
   113→
   114→    /**
   115→     * 获取平台对应的Cookie
   116→     */
   117→    private fun getCookieForPlatform(url: String): String? {
   118→        return when {
   119→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()
   120→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()
   121→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()
   122→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()
   123→            else -> null
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    /**
   128→     * 检查指定URL是否需要Cookie认证
   129→     */
   130→    fun isCookieRequired(url: String): Boolean {
   131→        return when {
   132→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   133→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   134→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   135→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   136→            else -> false
   137→        }
   138→    }
   139→
   140→    /**
   141→     * 检查是否已配置B站Cookie
   142→     */
   143→    fun hasBilibiliCookie(): Boolean {
   144→        return bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    /**
   148→     * 检查是否已配置YouTube Cookie
   149→     */
   150→    fun hasYouTubeCookie(): Boolean {
   151→        return youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    /**
   155→     * 检查是否已配置抖音 Cookie
   156→     */
   157→    fun hasDouyinCookie(): Boolean {
   158→        return douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   159→    }
   160→
   161→    /**
   162→     * 检查是否已配置TikTok Cookie
   163→     */
   164→    fun hasTiktokCookie(): Boolean {
   165→        return tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   166→    }

   168→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
   169→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   170→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   171→        .followRedirects(true)
   172→        .build()

   174→    /**
   175→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   176→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   177→     */
   178→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   179→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   180→        return when {
   181→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   182→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   183→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   184→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   185→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   186→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   187→            // TikTok
   188→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   189→            // 微博
   190→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   191→            // 小红书
   192→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   193→            // 微信视频号
   194→            lowerUrl.contains("channels.weixin.qq.com") ||
   195→            lowerUrl.contains("video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034") ||
   196→            lowerUrl.contains("weixin.qq.com/s/") -> VideoPlatform.WECHAT
   197→            // 直接视频链接
   198→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   199→            // 未知平台
   200→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   201→        }
   202→    }
   203→
   204→    /**
   205→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   206→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   207→     */
   208→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   209→        withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   210→            try {
   211→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   212→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")
   213→
   214→                val platform = detectPlatform(cleanUrl)
   215→                Log.d(TAG, "Detected platform: $platform")
   216→
   217→                when (platform) {
   218→                    VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> fetchYoutubeInfo(cleanUrl)
   219→                    VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> fetchBilibiliInfo(cleanUrl)
   220→                    VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> fetchDouyinInfo(cleanUrl)
   221→                    VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> fetchTiktokInfo(cleanUrl)
   222→                    VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU -> fetchXiaohongshuInfo(cleanUrl)
   223→                    VideoPlatform.WECHAT -> fetchWechatChannelsInfo(cleanUrl)
   224→                    VideoPlatform.DIRECT -> Result.success(
   225→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   226→                            title = "直接视频链接",
   227→                            downloadUrl = cleanUrl,
   228→                            cover = null,
   229→                            duration = 0L,
   230→                            author = null,
   231→                            platform = VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   232→                        )
   233→                    )
   234→                    else -> Result.failure(
   235→                        Exception(
   236→                            "❌ 不支持的平台\n\n当前链接: $cleanUrl\n\n支持的平台:\n• YouTube (youtube.com, youtu.be)\n• B站 (bilibili.com, b23.tv)\n• 抖音 (douyin.com)\n• TikTok (tiktok.com)\n• 小红书 (xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com)\n• 微信视频号 (channels.weixin.qq.com)\n\n建议: 请使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   237→                        )
   238→                    )
   239→                }
   240→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   241→                Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching video info", e)
   242→                Result.failure(e)
   243→            }
   244→        }
   245→    }

   247→    /**
   248→     * 清理 URL - 移除多余空格和无效字符
   249→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 cleanUrl 函数
   250→     */
   251→    private fun cleanUrl(url: String): String {
   252→        val trimmed = url.trim()
   253→        // 提取第一个有效的 HTTP/HTTPS 链接
   254→        val match = Regex("(https?://[^\\s\"'<>]+)").find(trimmed)
   255→        return match?.value ?: trimmed
   256→    }

   258→    /**
   259→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   260→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   261→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   262→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   263→     */
   264→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   265→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   266→
   267→        // 策略1: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（推荐）
   268→        val newPipeResult = fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url)
   269→        if (newPipeResult.isSuccess) {
   270→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor success")
   271→            return newPipeResult
   272→        }
   273→        Log.w(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor failed: ${newPipeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   274→
   275→        // 策略2: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
   276→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   277→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   278→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   279→            return innertubeResult
   280→        }
   281→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   282→
   283→        // 策略3: 尝试第三方API（最后备用）
   284→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   285→    }

   287→    /**
   288→     * 使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频
   289→     * 这是专门为 Android 设计的库，不依赖 YouTube API
   290→     */
   291→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   292→        try {
   293→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   294→                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   295→
   296→            Log.d(TAG, "Using NewPipeExtractor for YouTube: $videoId")
   297→
   298→            val streamInfo = org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo.getInfo(
   299→                org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.NewPipe.getService(0),
   300→                url
   301→            )
   302→
   303→            // 获取最佳视频流（videoStreams 已经是视频流，无需过滤）
   304→            val videoStream = streamInfo.videoStreams
   305→                .maxByOrNull { it.height ?: 0 }
   306→
   307→            // 获取音频流（audioStreams 已经是音频流，无需过滤）
   308→            val audioStream = streamInfo.audioStreams
   309→                .maxByOrNull { it.averageBitrate ?: 0 }
   310→
   311→            if (videoStream != null) {
   312→                Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   313→                    title = streamInfo.name ?: "YouTube 视频",
   314→                    downloadUrl = videoStream.url ?: "",
   315→                    cover = streamInfo.thumbnails?.firstOrNull()?.url,
   316→                    duration = streamInfo.duration?.toLong() ?: 0L,
   317→                    author = streamInfo.uploaderName,
   318→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   319→                    audioUrl = audioStream?.url
   320→                ))
   321→            } else {
   322→                Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   323→            }
   324→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   325→            Log.e(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor error", e)
   326→            Result.failure(e)
   327→        }
   328→    }

   330→    /**
   331→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   332→     * InnerTube 是 YouTube 的内部 RESTful API
   333→     */
   334→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   335→        try {
   336→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   337→            if (videoId == null) {
   338→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   339→            }
   340→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   341→
   342→            // InnerTube API 请求
   343→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   344→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   345→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   346→                        put("clientName", "ANDROID")
   347→                        put("clientVersion", "19.29.37")
   348→                    })
   349→                })
   350→                put("videoId", videoId)
   351→            }.toString()
   352→
   353→            val request = Request.Builder()
   354→                .url("https://www.youtube.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyAO_FJ2SlqU8Q4STEHLGCilw_Y9_11qcW8")
   355→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   356→                .header("User-Agent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37")
   357→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   358→                .build()
   359→
   360→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   361→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   362→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   363→
   364→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   365→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   366→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   367→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   368→
   369→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   370→            val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   371→
   372→            if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   373→                val format = formats.getJSONObject(0)
   374→                val videoUrl = format.optString("url")
   375→                val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   376→                val cover = thumbnails?.optJSONObject(0)?.optString("url") ?: ""
   377→
   378→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   379→                    title = title,
   380→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   381→                    cover = cover,
   382→                    duration = lengthSeconds,
   383→                    author = author,
   384→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   385→                ))
   386→            }
   387→
   388→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   389→
   390→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   391→            Log.e(TAG, "InnerTube API error", e)
   392→            Result.failure(e)
   393→        }
   394→    }

   396→    /**
   397→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）

   399→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   400→        // 尝试多个第三方API
   401→        val apis = listOf(
   402→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://yt.lemnoslife.com/videosPart", "lemnoslife"),
   403→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://noembed.com/embed?url=$url", "noembed")
   404→        )

   406→        for (api in apis) {

   416→        }
   417→
   418→        return Result.failure(
   419→            Exception("❌ YouTube 解析失败\n\n建议：请使用「导入本地视频」功能或在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载")

   423→    /**
   424→     * 使用指定 API 获取 YouTube 视频信息
   425→     */
   426→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(
   427→        url: String,
   428→        api: YoutubeApiConfig
   429→    ): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   430→        try {
   431→            when (api.name) {
   432→                "lemnoslife" -> {
   433→                    // 使用 Lemnoslife API
   434→                    val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   435→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   436→
   437→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   438→                        .url("${api.endpoint}?id=$videoId")
   439→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   440→                        .build()
   441→
   442→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   443→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   444→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   445→
   446→                    Log.d(TAG, "Lemnoslife API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   447→
   448→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   449→                    if (!json.has("items") || json.getJSONArray("items").length() == 0) {
   450→                        return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("视频不存在或不可用"))
   451→                    }
   452→
   453→                    val items = json.getJSONArray("items")
   454→                    val video = items.getJSONObject(0)
   455→
   456→                    // 注意：这个 API 主要提供元数据，不提供下载链接
   457→                    // 实际下载需要使用其他方法
   458→                    Result.success(
   459→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   460→                            title = video.optString("title", "YouTube 视频"),
   461→                            downloadUrl = url, // 返回原 URL，需要特殊处理
   462→                            cover = video.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   463→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   464→                                ?.optString("url"),
   465→                            duration = video.optLong("durationSeconds", 0L),
   466→                            author = video.optJSONArray("channel")
   467→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   468→                                ?.optString("name"),
   469→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   470→                        )
   471→                    )
   472→                }
   473→                "noembed" -> {
   474→                    // 使用 NoEmbed API（主要用于获取元数据）
   475→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   476→                        .url(api.endpoint)
   477→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   478→                        .build()
   479→
   480→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   481→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   482→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   483→
   484→                    Log.d(TAG, "NoEmbed API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   485→
   486→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   487→                    val title = json.optString("title", "YouTube 视频")
   488→                    val author = json.optString("author_name")
   489→
   490→                    Result.success(
   491→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   492→                            title = title,
   493→                            downloadUrl = url, // NoEmbed 不提供下载链接
   494→                            cover = json.optString("thumbnail_url"),
   495→                            duration = 0L,
   496→                            author = author,
   497→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   498→                        )
   499→                    )
   500→                }
   501→                else -> Result.failure(Exception("未知 API"))
   502→            }
   503→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   504→            Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching YouTube info with ${api.name}", e)
   505→            Result.failure(e)
   506→        }
   507→    }

   509→    /**
   510→     * 提取 B站 BV 号
   511→     * 支持 BV 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   512→     */
   513→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   514→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   515→        val match = bvPattern.find(url)
   516→        return match?.groupValues?.get(1)
   517→    }
   518→
   519→    /**
   520→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   521→     */
   522→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   523→        // 支持 youtube.com/watch?v= 和 youtu.be/ 格式
   524→        val patterns = listOf(
   525→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   526→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   527→        )
   528→
   529→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   530→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   531→            if (match != null) {
   532→                return match.groupValues[1]
   533→            }
   534→        }
   535→        return null
   536→    }

   538→    /**
   539→     * 获取 B站视频信息 - 改进版，优先使用官方API
   540→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：bilibili-api Kotlin 库实现
   541→     *
   542→     * 策略：
   543→     * 1. 优先使用 B站官方 API
   544→     * 2. 官方API失败后，尝试第三方API作为备用
   545→     */
   546→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   547→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   548→
   549→        // 策略1: 尝试官方API
   550→        val officialResult = fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url)
   551→        if (officialResult.isSuccess) {
   552→            Log.d(TAG, "Official API success")
   553→            return officialResult
   554→        }
   555→        Log.w(TAG, "Official API failed: ${officialResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   556→
   557→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   558→        return fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url)

   560→
   561→    /**
   562→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   563→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   564→     *
   565→     * API 端点：
   566→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   567→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   568→     */
   569→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   570→        try {
   571→            // 1. 提取 BV 号
   572→            val bvid = extractBVID(url)
   573→            if (bvid == null) {
   574→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号"))
   575→            }
   576→            Log.d(TAG, "BV ID: $bvid")
   577→
   578→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   579→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   580→            if (cookie != null) {
   581→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   582→            }
   583→
   584→            // 2. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）
   585→            val infoUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$bvid"
   586→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   587→                .url(infoUrl)
   588→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   589→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   590→
   591→            // 添加Cookie
   592→            if (cookie != null) {
   593→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   594→            }
   595→
   596→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   597→
   598→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   599→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   600→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   601→
   602→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   603→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   604→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   605→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   606→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   607→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   608→                    )
   609→                }
   610→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   611→            }
   612→
   613→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   614→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   615→            val title = data.optString("title")
   616→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   617→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   618→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   619→
   620→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   621→
   622→            // 3. 获取播放URL - 优先使用DASH格式（支持ffmpeg合并音视频）
   623→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid=$bvid&cid=$cid&qn=80&fnval=16&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   624→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   625→                .url(playUrl)
   626→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   627→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   628→
   629→            if (cookie != null) {
   630→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   631→            }
   632→
   633→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   634→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   635→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   636→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   637→
   638→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   639→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   640→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   641→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   642→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   643→                    )
   644→                }
   645→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   646→            }
   647→
   648→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   649→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   650→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   651→
   652→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   653→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   654→
   655→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   656→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   657→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   658→            } else if (dash != null) {
   659→                // DASH格式 - 需要分别下载音频和视频
   660→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   661→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   662→
   663→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   664→                    videoUrl = dashVideo.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   665→                    // 尝试选择最佳音频质量
   666→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   667→                        audioUrl = dashAudio.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   668→                    }
   669→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format detected: video and audio will be merged")
   670→                }
   671→            }
   672→
   673→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   674→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   675→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   676→                    title = title,
   677→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   678→                    cover = cover,
   679→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   680→                    author = author,
   681→                    cookies = cookie,
   682→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   683→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   684→                ))
   685→            }
   686→
   687→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   688→
   689→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   690→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   691→            Result.failure(e)
   692→        }
   693→    }
