   747→    /**
   748→     * 使用指定 API 获取 B站视频信息
   749→     */
   750→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   751→        // 健康检查：跳过已知不可用的 API
   752→        if (!isApiHealthy(api.endpoint)) {
   753→            Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API is marked as unhealthy, skipping")
   754→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API暂时不可用"))
   755→        }
   756→
   757→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   758→        try {
   759→            val request = Request.Builder()
   760→                .url(api.endpoint)
   761→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   762→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   763→                .build()
   764→
   765→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   766→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   767→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   768→
   769→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   770→
   771→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   772→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   773→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   774→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   775→            }
   776→
   777→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   778→
   779→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   780→
   781→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   782→            if (json.has("data")) {
   783→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   784→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   785→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   786→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   787→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   788→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   789→
   790→                val title = data.optString("title")
   791→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   792→                    ?: "B站视频"
   793→
   794→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   795→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   796→                    updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   797→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   798→                        title = title,
   799→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   800→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   801→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   802→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   803→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   804→                        author = data.optString("author")
   805→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   806→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   807→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   808→                            }
   809→                    ))
   810→                }
   811→            }
   812→
   813→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   814→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   815→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   816→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   817→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   818→
   819→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   820→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"
   821→                Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got direct URL: $directUrl")
   822→                updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   823→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   824→                    title = title,
   825→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
   826→                    cover = json.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("cover"),
   827→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   828→                    author = json.optString("author")
   829→                ))
   830→            }
   831→
   832→            // 格式3: {code: 200, data: {url: "..."}} 或 {code: 200, url: "..."}
   833→            if (json.optInt("code") == 200 || json.optInt("code") == 1) {
   834→                val nestedData = json.optJSONObject("data")
   835→                val videoUrl = nestedData?.optString("url")
   836→                    ?: nestedData?.optString("video_url")
   837→                    ?: json.optString("url")
   838→                    ?: json.optString("video_url")
   839→
   840→                if (videoUrl?.startsWith("http") == true) {
   841→                    val title = nestedData?.optString("title")
   842→                        ?: json.optString("title")
   843→                        ?: "B站视频"
   844→                    updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   845→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   846→                        title = title,
   847→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   848→                        cover = nestedData?.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("pic"),
   849→                        duration = nestedData?.optLong("duration", 0L)?.div(1000) ?: 0L
   850→                    ))
   851→                }
   852→            }
   853→
   854→            // 格式4: {msg: "...", code: ...} - 可能包含错误信息
   855→            val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message")
   856→            if (msg.isNotEmpty()) {
   857→                updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, msg)
   858→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回: $msg"))
   859→            }
   860→
   861→            // 无法解析
   862→            updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, "无法解析API响应格式")
   863→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析API响应格式"))
   864→
   865→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   866→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   867→            updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, e.message)
   868→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   869→            Result.failure(e)
   870→        }
   871→    }

   929→    /**
   930→     * 使用指定 API 获取抖音视频信息
   931→     */
   932→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api: DouyinApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   933→        try {
   934→            val request = Request.Builder()
   935→                .url(api.endpoint)
   936→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   937→                .header("Referer", "https://www.douyin.com/")
   938→                .build()
   939→
   940→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   941→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   942→
   943→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   944→
   945→            // 检查是否是HTML
   946→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   947→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   948→            }
   949→
   950→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   951→
   952→            // 检查响应状态码
   953→            val code = json.optInt("code")
   954→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
   955→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
   956→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
   957→            }
   958→
   959→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种格式
   960→            // 格式1: {code: 200, data: {video: [{play_addr: "..."}], desc: "..."}}
   961→            if (json.has("data")) {
   962→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   963→
   964→                // 尝试获取视频 URL
   965→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0)
   966→                    ?: data.optJSONArray("data")?.optJSONObject(0)
   967→                    ?: data
   968→
   969→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
   970→                    ?: videoData.optString("play_addr_https")
   971→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
   972→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
   973→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
   974→
   975→                val title = data.optString("desc")
   976→                    ?: data.optString("title")
   977→                    ?: data.optString("text")
   978→                    ?: "抖音视频"
   979→
   980→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
   981→                    // 处理相对协议 URL
   982→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
   983→
   984→                    // 提取作者信息
   985→                    val author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
   986→                        ?: data.optString("author")
   987→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
   988→
   989→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
   990→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
   991→                        ?: data.optString("origin_cover")
   992→                        ?: data.optString("dynamic_cover")
   993→                        ?: videoData.optString("cover")
   994→
   995→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   996→                        title = title,
   997→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
   998→                        cover = cover,
   999→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1000→                        author = author
  1001→                    ))
  1002→                }
  1003→            }
  1004→
  1005→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "...", author: "..."}
  1006→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
  1007→                ?: json.optString("play_addr")
  1008→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1009→
  1010→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http") || directUrl.startsWith("//")) {
  1011→                val finalUrl = if (directUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$directUrl" else directUrl
  1012→                val title = json.optString("title")
  1013→                    ?: json.optString("desc")
  1014→                    ?: json.optString("text")
  1015→                    ?: "抖音视频"
  1016→
  1017→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1018→                    title = title,
  1019→                    downloadUrl = finalUrl,
  1020→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
  1021→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1022→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname")
  1023→                ))
  1024→            }
  1025→
  1026→            // 无法获取视频链接
  1027→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1028→
  1029→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1030→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1031→            Result.failure(e)
  1032→        }
  1033→    }

  1085→    private suspend fun fetchTiktokInfoWithApi(api: TiktokApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {

  1095→
  1096→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1097→
  1098→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {

  1101→
  1102→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1103→
  1104→            // tikwm API 格式: {code: 0, data: {title: "...", play: "...", ...}}

  1115→                            downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1116→                            cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("origin_cover"),
  1117→                            duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1118→                            author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1119→                        ))
  1120→                    }
  1121→                }
  1122→            }
  1123→
  1124→            // 其他 API 通用格式
  1125→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1126→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1127→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1128→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1129→            }
  1130→
  1131→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1132→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1133→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0) ?: data
  1134→
  1135→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1136→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
  1137→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
  1138→
  1139→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1140→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1141→                        title = data.optString("desc") ?: data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1142→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1143→                        cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("thumb"),
  1144→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1145→                        author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1146→                    ))
  1147→                }
  1148→            }
  1149→
  1150→            // 直接格式
  1151→            val directUrl = json.optString("url") ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1152→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1153→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1154→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1155→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1156→                    cover = json.optString("cover"),
  1157→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L)
  1158→                ))
  1159→            }
  1160→
  1161→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1162→
  1163→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1164→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1165→            Result.failure(e)
  1166→        }
  1167→    }

  1169→    /**

  1174→        return "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +

  1178→    /**
  1179→     * 获取小红书视频信息
  1180→     * 支持格式：
  1181→     * - https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/{noteId}
  1182→     * - https://www.xiaohongshu.com/discovery/item/{noteId}
  1183→     * - https://xhslink.com/{shortId}
  1184→     */
  1185→    private suspend fun fetchXiaohongshuInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
  1186→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Xiaohongshu info for: $url")
  1187→
  1188→        // 尝试多个 API
  1189→        val apis = listOf(
  1190→            XiaohongshuApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/xiaohongshu?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
  1191→            XiaohongshuApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/xiaohongshu/video/download?url=$url", "xboba")
  1192→        )
  1193→
  1194→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
  1195→            try {
  1196→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Xiaohongshu API: ${api.name}")
  1197→                val result = fetchXiaohongshuInfoWithApi(api)
  1198→                if (result.isSuccess) {
  1199→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
  1200→                    return result
  1201→                }
  1202→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
  1203→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1204→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
  1205→            }
  1206→        }
  1207→
  1208→        return Result.failure(
  1209→            Exception("❌ 小红书解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 笔记是私密内容\n• 笔记已删除\n• API 服务限流\n\n建议：\n• 确认笔记链接有效\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 res-downloader 等工具")
  1210→        )
  1211→    }
  1212→
  1213→    private suspend fun fetchXiaohongshuInfoWithApi(api: XiaohongshuApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1214→        try {
  1215→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1216→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1217→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1218→                .header("Referer", "https://www.xiaohongshu.com/")
  1219→                .build()
  1220→
  1221→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1222→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1223→
  1224→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1225→
  1226→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1227→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
  1228→            }
  1229→
  1230→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1231→
  1232→            // 检查响应状态码
  1233→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1234→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1235→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1236→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1237→            }
  1238→
  1239→            // 解析视频数据
  1240→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1241→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1242→
  1243→                val videoUrl = data.optString("url")
  1244→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
  1245→                    ?: data.optString("play_addr")
  1246→                    ?: data.optString("download_addr")
  1247→
  1248→                val title = data.optString("title")
  1249→                    ?: data.optString("desc")
  1250→                    ?: data.optString("text")
  1251→                    ?: "小红书视频"
  1252→
  1253→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1254→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1255→                        title = title,
  1256→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1257→                        cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("thumb"),
  1258→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1259→                        author = data.optString("author") ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1260→                    ))
  1261→                }
  1262→            }
  1263→
  1264→            Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1265→
  1266→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1267→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1268→            Result.failure(e)
  1269→        }
  1270→    }

  1272→    /**
  1273→     * 获取微信视频号视频信息
  1274→     *
  1275→     * 微信视频号解析方案（安卓限制）：

  1278→     * 参考项目：

  1287→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching WeChat Channels info for: $url")
  1288→
  1289→        // 尝试多个第三方 API
  1290→        val apis = listOf(

  1292→            // 可以添加更多备用 API
  1293→            // WechatApiConfig("https://api.example.com/wechat?url=$url", "example")
  1294→        )
  1295→
  1296→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
  1297→            try {
  1298→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying WeChat API: ${api.name}")
  1299→                val result = fetchWechatChannelsInfoWithApi(api)
  1300→                if (result.isSuccess) {
  1301→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
  1302→                    return result
  1303→                }
  1304→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
  1305→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1306→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
  1307→            }
  1308→        }
  1309→
  1310→        // 如果所有 API 都失败，返回友好错误
  1311→        return Result.failure(
  1312→            Exception(
  1313→                "❌ 微信视频号解析受限\n\n" +
  1314→                "由于微信视频号的特殊保护机制，安卓端暂不支持直接解析。\n\n" +
  1315→                "推荐方案：\n" +
  1316→                "1. 电脑端使用 res-downloader 工具\n" +
  1317→                "   https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader\n\n" +
  1318→                "2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n" +
  1319→                "   先在电脑下载后传输到手机\n\n" +
  1320→                "3. 录屏方式\n" +
  1321→                "   使用系统录屏保存视频"
  1322→            )
  1323→        )
  1324→    }

    28→/**
    29→ * FFmpeg 分段转录服务 - 使用 FFmpeg Kit 处理大视频文件
    30→ *
    31→ * 增强功能：
    32→ * - 重试机制：每个段失败后自动重试
    33→ * - 超时控制：防止段处理卡死
    34→ * - 剩余时间估算：实时显示预计完成时间
    35→ * - 进度持久化：应用崩溃后可恢复（TODO）
    36→ *
    37→ * 参考 GitHub 项目：
    38→ * - WritingMinds/ffmpeg-kit: Android FFmpeg 支持
    39→ * - gvk7/Whisper-Ffmpeg-Multi-Segment: 多段 Whisper 转录
    40→ * - wendy7756/AI-Video-Transcriber: 20分钟分段策略
    41→ */
    42→@Singleton
    43→class FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    44→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
    45→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    46→) {
    47→    companion object {
    48→        private const val TAG = "FFmpegSegmentTrans"
    49→        // Groq API 文件大小限制（调整为安全值）
    50→        private const val MAX_API_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L // 25MB（Groq 实际限制）
    51→        // 音频段目标大小（留出安全余量）
    52→        private const val TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE = 20 * 1024 * 1024L // 20MB
    53→        // 分段转录的时长阈值（秒）- 超过此时长使用分段转录
    54→        private const val SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD = 300.0 // 5分钟（降低阈值）
    55→        // 分段时长（秒）- 降低到5分钟，确保文件大小可控
    56→        private const val SEGMENT_DURATION = 300L // 5分钟
    57→        // 段间重叠时间（秒）
    58→        private const val OVERLAP_DURATION = 2L
    59→        // 临时文件目录
    60→        private const val TEMP_DIR = "transcription_temp"
    61→        // 最大重试次数
    62→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    63→        // 重试延迟（毫秒）
    64→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 2000L
    65→        // 段提取超时（秒）
    66→        private const val EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC = 300L  // 5分钟超时
    67→        // 段转录超时（秒）- 根据段长度动态计算
    68→        private const val TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN = 180L // 每分钟音频最多3分钟
    69→        // 并行处理数量 - 根据设备性能动态调整（2-3个并行转录）
    70→        private const val PARALLEL_SEGMENTS = 2
    71→        // API请求间隔（毫秒）- 避免请求过快被限流
    72→        private const val API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS = 500L
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 分段转录进度数据 - 增强版
    77→     */
    78→    data class SegmentProgress(
    79→        val currentSegment: Int,
    80→        val totalSegments: Int,
    81→        val percent: Int,
    82→        val message: String,
    83→        val remainingSeconds: Long = 0,
    84→        val estimatedCompletionTime: Long = 0,
    85→        // 新增：详细的分段状态
    86→        val segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState> = emptyMap()
    87→    )
    88→
    89→    /**
    90→     * 分段状态
    91→     */
    92→    data class SegmentState(
    93→        val index: Int,
    94→        val status: SegmentStatus,
    95→        val message: String = ""
    96→    )
    97→
    98→    enum class SegmentStatus {
    99→        PENDING,       // 等待处理
   100→        EXTRACTING,    // 提取音频中
   101→        EXTRACTED,     // 音频提取完成
   102→        TRANSCRIBING,  // 转录中
   103→        COMPLETED,     // 完成
   104→        FAILED         // 失败
   105→    }
   106→
   107→    /**
   108→     * 分段转录视频
   109→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   110→     * @param config AI配置
   111→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   112→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   113→     */
   114→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   115→        videoFile: File,
   116→        config: AIConfig,
   117→        lang: String? = null,
   118→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   119→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   120→        try {
   121→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   122→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   123→
   124→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   125→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   126→
   127→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   128→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   129→
   130→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   131→            val duration = try {
   132→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   133→                when {
   134→                    durationStr == null -> null
   135→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   136→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   137→                    else -> {
   138→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   139→                        null
   140→                    }
   141→                }
   142→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   143→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   144→                null
   145→            }
   146→
   147→            if (duration == null) {
   148→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   149→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
   150→                    success = false,
   151→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   152→                )
   153→            }
   154→
   155→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   156→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   157→
   158→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   159→            return@withContext when {
   160→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   161→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   162→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   163→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   164→
   165→                    // 先压缩音频
   166→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   167→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   168→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   169→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   170→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   171→                    } else {
   172→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   173→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   174→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   175→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   176→                        compressedFile.delete()
   177→                        result
   178→                    }
   179→                }
   180→                else -> {
   181→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   182→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   183→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   184→                    } else {
   185→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   186→                    }
   187→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   188→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   189→                }
   190→            }
   191→
   192→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   193→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   194→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   195→            WhisperResult(
   196→                success = false,
   197→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   198→            )
   199→        }
   200→    }
   201→
   202→    /**
   203→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（详细进度跟踪）
   204→     */
   205→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   206→        videoFile: File,
   207→        config: AIConfig,
   208→        duration: Double,
   209→        lang: String?,
   210→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   211→    ): WhisperResult? {
   212→        // 计算分段数量，传入文件大小以优化分段策略
   213→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length())
   214→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   215→
   216→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   217→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   218→
   219→        // 分段状态跟踪
   220→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   221→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   222→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   223→        }
   224→
   225→        // 创建临时目录
   226→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   227→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   228→
   229→        // 时间跟踪
   230→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   231→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   232→
   233→        return try {
   234→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   235→            var failedSegments = 0
   236→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   237→
   238→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   239→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   240→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   241→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   242→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   243→
   244→                // 更新状态
   245→                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   246→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   247→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   248→
   249→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   250→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   251→                }
   252→
   253→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   254→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   255→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "音频已提取")
   256→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted successfully")
   257→                } else {
   258→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   259→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   260→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   261→                    failedSegments++
   262→                }
   263→
   264→                // 更新状态
   265→                updateProgressWithStates(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + ((index + 1) * 20 / totalSegments),
   266→                    "提取完成 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   267→            }
   268→
   269→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   270→            updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "开始转录...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   271→
   272→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   273→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   274→            // 使用 semaphore 控制并发数
   275→            val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   276→
   277→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理
   278→            val results = coroutineScope {
   279→                // 创建分段任务
   280→                val transcriptionJobs = segments.mapIndexed { index, segment ->
   281→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   282→                        // 使用 semaphore 限制并发数
   283→                        semaphore.withPermit {
   284→                            if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   285→                                Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   286→                                return@async null
   287→                            }
   288→
   289→                            val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   290→                            val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   291→
   292→                            // 更新状态为转录中
   293→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   294→                            updateProgressWithStates(completedIndices.size, totalSegments, 40,
   295→                                "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   296→
   297→                            // 计算本段转录超时时间
   298→                            val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   299→
   300→                            // 转录该段
   301→                            val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   302→                                transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, lang)
   303→                            }
   304→
   305→                            val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   306→                            segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   307→
   308→                            if (result?.success == true) {
   309→                                // 调整时间戳
   310→                                val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   311→                                    wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   312→                                }
   313→
   314→                                // 线程安全地添加结果
   315→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   316→                                    // 去除重叠部分
   317→                                    if (index > 0) {
   318→                                        val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   319→                                        val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   320→                                        allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   321→                                    } else {
   322→                                        allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   323→                                    }
   324→                                    completedIndices.add(index)
   325→                                    successSegments.add(index)
   326→                                }
   327→
   328→                                // 删除临时段文件
   329→                                segmentFile.delete()
   330→
   331→                                // 更新状态为完成
   332→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   333→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   334→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   335→                                    val progress = 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments)
   336→                                    val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   337→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   338→                                        "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   339→                                }
   340→
   341→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   342→                                result
   343→                            } else {
   344→                                Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   345→                                failedSegments++
   346→
   347→                                // 更新状态为失败
   348→                                val errorBrief = if (result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true) "API Key错误"
   349→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("quota") == true) "配额用尽"
   350→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("network") == true) "网络错误"
   351→                                    else "转录失败"
   352→
   353→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   354→
   355→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   356→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   357→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   358→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 失败: $errorBrief", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   359→                                }
   360→
   361→                                null
   362→                            }
   363→                        }
   364→                    }
   365→                }
   366→
   367→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   368→                transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   369→            }
   370→
   371→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   372→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   373→
   374→            // 清理临时目录
   375→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   376→
   377→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   378→                // 所有分段都失败了 - 提供详细的失败原因
   379→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   380→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   381→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   382→                    .joinToString("\n")
   383→
   384→                WhisperResult(
   385→                    success = false,
   386→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   387→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   388→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   389→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   390→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   391→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   392→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   393→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   394→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   395→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   396→                )
   397→            } else {
   398→                // 部分或全部成功
   399→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   400→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   401→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   402→
   403→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   404→
   405→                val resultMessage = if (failedSegments > 0) {
   406→                    "转录完成（部分失败）\n\n成功: ${successSegments.size}/$totalSegments\n失败: $failedSegments"
   407→                } else {
   408→                    "转录完成！\n\n成功: $totalSegments/$totalSegments 段"
   409→                }
   410→
   411→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   412→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   413→
   414→                WhisperResult(
   415→                    success = true,
   416→                    text = fullText,
   417→                    words = allWords,
   418→                    detectedLang = ""
   419→                )
   420→            }
   421→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   422→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   423→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   424→            WhisperResult(
   425→                success = false,
   426→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   427→            )
   428→        }
   429→    }
   430→
   431→    /**
   432→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   433→     */
   434→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   435→        currentSegment: Int,
   436→        totalSegments: Int,
   437→        percent: Int,
   438→        message: String,
   439→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   440→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   441→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   442→    ) {
   443→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   444→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   445→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   446→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   447→
   448→        val statusSummary = when {
   449→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   450→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   451→            else -> ""
   452→        }
   453→
   454→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   455→    }
   456→
   457→    /**
   458→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   459→     */
   460→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   461→        inputFile: File,
   462→        outputFile: File,
   463→        startTime: Double,
   464→        duration: Double,
   465→        segmentIndex: Int
   466→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   467→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   468→
   469→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   470→            if (attempt > 0) {
   471→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   472→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   473→            }
   474→
   475→            try {
   476→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   477→                if (success) return@withContext true
   478→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   479→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   480→                lastError = e
   481→            }
   482→        }
   483→
   484→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   485→        false
   486→    }
   487→
   488→    /**
   489→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制
   490→     */
   491→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   492→        segmentFile: File,
   493→        config: AIConfig,
   494→        segmentIndex: Int,
   495→        segmentDuration: Double,
   496→        lang: String?
   497→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   498→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   499→
   500→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   501→            if (attempt > 0) {
   502→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   503→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   504→            }
   505→
   506→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   507→            if (result?.success == true) {
   508→                // 成功后添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   509→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   510→                return@withContext result
   511→            }
   512→            // 重试前添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   513→            if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1) {
   514→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   515→            }
   516→            lastResult = result
   517→        }
   518→
   519→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   520→        lastResult
   521→    }
   522→
   523→    /**
   524→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   525→     */
   526→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   527→        currentIndex: Int,
   528→        totalSegments: Int,
   529→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   530→        overallStartTime: Long
   531→    ): Long {
   532→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   533→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   534→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   535→        }
   536→
   537→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   538→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   539→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   540→
   541→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   542→    }
   543→
   544→    /**
   545→     * 格式化时间显示
   546→     */
   547→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   548→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   549→        return when {
   550→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   551→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   552→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   553→        }
   554→    }
   555→
   556→    /**
   557→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段，根据文件大小动态调整
   558→     * 大文件使用更短的分段时长，确保每段文件大小在API限制内
   559→     */
   560→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   561→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   562→
   563→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   564→        // 预估比特率 = 文件大小 / 时长
   565→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   566→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   567→        } else {
   568→            128.0 // 默认假设128kbps
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   572→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = if (estimatedBitrate > 0) {
   573→            (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / estimatedBitrate / 1000.0).coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   574→        } else {
   575→            SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble()
   576→        }
   577→
   578→        // 使用计算出的分段时长，但不低于3分钟
   579→        val segmentDurationSec = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0)
   580→        val overlapDurationSec = OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   581→        val effectiveAdvance = segmentDurationSec - overlapDurationSec
   582→
   583→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: duration=${segmentDurationSec.toInt()}s, overlap=${overlapDurationSec}s, bitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps")
   584→
   585→        // 预先计算分段数量，避免无限循环
   586→        val totalSegments = ((duration - overlapDurationSec) / effectiveAdvance).toInt().coerceAtLeast(1)
   587→
   588→        for (index in 0 until totalSegments) {
   589→            val startTime = index * effectiveAdvance
   590→            val segmentDuration = if (index == totalSegments - 1) {
   591→                // 最后一段：处理剩余所有时间
   592→                duration - startTime
   593→            } else {
   594→                // 中间段：固定长度
   595→                segmentDurationSec
   596→            }
   597→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, startTime, segmentDuration))
   598→        }
   599→
   600→        return segments
   601→    }
   602→
   603→    /**
   604→     * 提取音频段 - 使用 stream copy 避免重新编码
   605→     */
   606→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   607→        inputFile: File,
   608→        outputFile: File,
   609→        startTime: Double,
   610→        duration: Double
   611→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   612→        try {
   613→            // 确保输出目录存在
   614→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   615→
   616→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 -c copy 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   617→            val commandStr = buildString {
   618→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   619→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   620→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   621→                append("-t $duration ")
   622→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   623→                append("-c:a copy ")  // 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   624→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   625→            }
   626→
   627→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   628→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   629→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   630→
   631→            // 使用同步执行
   632→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   633→
   634→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   635→            val output = session.output
   636→
   637→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   638→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   639→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   640→            }
   641→
   642→            // 检查输出文件
   643→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   644→
   645→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   646→            success
   647→
   648→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   649→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   650→            false
   651→        }
   652→    }
   653→
   654→    /**
   655→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   656→     * 确保文件大小符合 API 限制
   657→     */
   658→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   659→        try {
   660→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.m4a")
   661→
   662→            val commandStr = buildString {
   663→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   664→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   665→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   666→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   667→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率
   668→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   669→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐的最小值）
   670→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   671→            }
   672→
   673→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   674→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   675→
   676→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   677→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists()
   678→
   679→            if (success) {
   680→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes")
   681→                tempFile
   682→            } else {
   683→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}")
   684→                tempFile.delete()
   685→                null
   686→            }
   687→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   688→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   689→            null
   690→        }
   691→    }
   692→
   693→    /**
   694→     * 获取视频信息
   695→     */
   696→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   697→        return try {
   698→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   699→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   700→
   701→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   702→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe state: ${session.state}")
   703→
   704→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {
   705→                val info = session.mediaInformation
   706→                Log.d(TAG, "MediaInfo - Duration: ${info?.getDuration()}")
   707→                info
   708→            } else {
   709→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe failed with code ${session.returnCode?.value}")
   710→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   711→                null
   712→            }
   713→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   714→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting media info", e)
   715→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   716→            null
   717→        }
   718→    }
   719→
   720→    /**
   721→     * 从单词构建句子
   722→     */
   723→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   724→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   725→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   726→
   727→        words.forEach { wt ->
   728→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   729→
   730→            // 检查句子结束
   731→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   732→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   733→                currentSentence.clear()
   734→            }
   735→        }
   736→
   737→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   738→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   739→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   740→        }
   741→
   742→        return sentences
   743→    }
   744→}

   746→/**
   747→ * 音频分段数据类
   748→ */
   749→data class AudioSegment(
   750→    val index: Int,
   751→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   752→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   753→)
