content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.ui.component
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import android.webkit.CookieManager
     5→import android.webkit.WebChromeClient
     6→import android.webkit.WebResourceError
     7→import android.webkit.WebResourceRequest
     8→import android.webkit.WebView
     9→import android.webkit.WebViewClient
    10→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
    11→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
    12→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.CheckCircle
    13→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    14→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    17→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
    18→import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextAlign
    19→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    20→import androidx.compose.ui.viewinterop.AndroidView
    21→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    22→
    23→/**
    24→ * 登录状态枚举
    25→ */
    26→internal enum class BilibiliLoginStatus {
    27→    Idle,
    28→    LoggingIn,
    29→    Success,
    30→    Failed
    31→}
    32→
    33→/**
    34→ * B站Cookie数据类
    35→ */
    36→data class BilibiliCookies(
    37→    val sessdata: String?,
    38→    val biliJct: String?,
    39→    val dedeUserID: String?,
    40→    val fullCookie: String = "" // 完整Cookie字符串，包含所有字段
    41→)
    42→
    43→/**
    44→ * B站登录对话框
    45→ * 使用WebView内嵌B站登录页面，自动提取Cookie
    46→ */
    47→@Composable
    48→fun BilibiliLoginDialog(
    49→    onDismiss: () -> Unit,
    50→    onCookiesExtracted: (BilibiliCookies) -> Unit,
    51→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
    52→) {
    53→    var isLoading by remember { mutableStateOf(true) }
    54→    var currentUrl by remember { mutableStateOf("") }
    55→    var loginStatus by remember { mutableStateOf(BilibiliLoginStatus.Idle) }
    56→    var errorMessage by remember { mutableStateOf<String?>(null) }
    57→    val context = LocalContext.current
    58→
    59→    // 初始化CookieManager
    60→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    61→        CookieManager.getInstance().apply {
    62→            setAcceptCookie(true)
    63→            // setAcceptThirdPartyCookies 需要WebView实例，在WebView创建后设置
    64→        }
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    // 定期检查登录状态
    68→    LaunchedEffect(currentUrl) {
    69→        if (currentUrl.isNotEmpty() && currentUrl.contains("bilibili.com")) {
    70→            delay(2000) // 等待页面加载完成
    71→            tryExtractCookies(currentUrl) { cookies ->
    72→                if (cookies.sessdata != null) {
    73→                    loginStatus = BilibiliLoginStatus.Success
    74→                    onCookiesExtracted(cookies)
    75→                }
    76→            }
    77→        }
    78→    }
    79→
    80→    AlertDialog(
    81→        onDismissRequest = onDismiss,
    82→        modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth(0.98f),
    83→        title = {
    84→            Column {
    85→                Text("自动获取B站Cookie")
    86→                if (isLoading) {
    87→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
    88→                    LinearProgressIndicator(
    89→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
    90→                    )
    91→                }
    92→            }
    93→        },
    94→        text = {
    95→            Column(
    96→                modifier = Modifier
    97→                    .fillMaxWidth()
    98→                    .heightIn(min = 550.dp, max = 700.dp)
    99→            ) {
   100→                // 状态提示
   101→                when (loginStatus) {
   102→                    BilibiliLoginStatus.Idle -> {
   103→                        Card(
   104→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   105→                            colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   106→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer
   107→                            )
   108→                        ) {
   109→                            Text(
   110→                                "请在下方页面完成登录，登录成功后会自动获取Cookie",
   111→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   112→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   113→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   114→                            )
   115→                        }
   116→                        Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   117→                    }
   118→                    BilibiliLoginStatus.Success -> {
   119→                        Card(
   120→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   121→                            colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   122→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
   123→                            )
   124→                        ) {
   125→                            Row(
   126→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   127→                                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   128→                            ) {
   129→                                Icon(
   130→                                    Icons.Default.CheckCircle,
   131→                                    contentDescription = null,
   132→                                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   133→                                    modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   134→                                )
   135→                                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   136→                                Text(
   137→                                    "Cookie获取成功！",
   138→                                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   139→                                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   140→                                )
   141→                            }
   142→                        }
   143→                        Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   144→                    }
   145→                    BilibiliLoginStatus.Failed -> {
   146→                        Card(
   147→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   148→                            colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   149→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer
   150→                            )
   151→                        ) {
   152→                            Text(
   153→                                errorMessage ?: "Cookie获取失败，请重试",
   154→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   155→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   156→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onErrorContainer
   157→                            )
   158→                        }
   159→                        Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   160→                    }
   161→                    BilibiliLoginStatus.LoggingIn -> {
   162→                        Card(
   163→                            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   164→                            colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   165→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer
   166→                            )
   167→                        ) {
   168→                            Text(
   169→                                "正在检测登录状态...",
   170→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp),
   171→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   172→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onTertiaryContainer
   173→                            )
   174→                        }
   175→                        Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   176→                    }
   177→                }
   178→
   179→                // WebView
   180→                AndroidView(
   181→                    factory = { ctx ->
   182→                        WebView(ctx).apply {
   183→                            settings.apply {
   184→                                javaScriptEnabled = true
   185→                                domStorageEnabled = true
   186→                                @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
   187→                                databaseEnabled = true
   188→                                cacheMode = android.webkit.WebSettings.LOAD_DEFAULT
   189→                                mixedContentMode = android.webkit.WebSettings.MIXED_CONTENT_ALWAYS_ALLOW
   190→                                userAgentString = "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36"
   191→                                // 启用缩放支持
   192→                                setSupportZoom(true)
   193→                                builtInZoomControls = true
   194→                                displayZoomControls = false // 隐藏原生缩放按钮，使用手势
   195→                                loadWithOverviewMode = true
   196→                                useWideViewPort = true
   197→                                // 设置默认缩放
   198→                                textZoom = 120
   199→                            }
   200→
   201→                            webViewClient = object : WebViewClient() {
   202→                                override fun onPageStarted(view: WebView?, url: String?, favicon: android.graphics.Bitmap?) {
   203→                                    super.onPageStarted(view, url, favicon)
   204→                                    isLoading = true
   205→                                    loginStatus = BilibiliLoginStatus.LoggingIn
   206→                                    currentUrl = url ?: ""
   207→                                }
   208→
   209→                                override fun onPageFinished(view: WebView?, url: String?) {
   210→                                    super.onPageFinished(view, url)
   211→                                    isLoading = false
   212→                                    currentUrl = url ?: ""
   213→
   214→                                    // 注入JavaScript检测登录状态
   215→                                    view?.evaluateJavascript(
   216→                                        """
   217→                                        (function() {
   218→                                            // 检测是否有用户头像（登录标志）
   219→                                            var avatar = document.querySelector('.header-avatar-wrap, .nav-user-info');
   220→                                            return avatar !== null;
   221→                                        })()
   222→                                        """.trimIndent()
   223→                                    ) { result ->
   224→                                        if (result == "true") {
   225→                                            // 已登录，提取Cookie
   226→                                            tryExtractCookies(url ?: "") { cookies ->
   227→                                                if (cookies.sessdata != null) {
   228→                                                    loginStatus = BilibiliLoginStatus.Success
   229→                                                    onCookiesExtracted(cookies)
   230→                                                }
   231→                                            }
   232→                                        }
   233→                                    }
   234→                                }
   235→
   236→                                override fun onReceivedError(
   237→                                    view: WebView?,
   238→                                    request: WebResourceRequest?,
   239→                                    error: WebResourceError?
   240→                                ) {
   241→                                    super.onReceivedError(view, request, error)
   242→                                    errorMessage = error?.description?.toString() ?: "加载失败"
   243→                                    loginStatus = BilibiliLoginStatus.Failed
   244→                                }
   245→                            }
   246→
   247→                            webChromeClient = object : WebChromeClient() {
   248→                                override fun onProgressChanged(view: WebView?, newProgress: Int) {
   249→                                    // 可以在这里更新进度条
   250→                                }
   251→                            }
   252→
   253→                            // 清除之前的Cookie
   254→                            CookieManager.getInstance().removeAllCookies(null)
   255→
   256→                            // 设置第三方Cookie（需要在WebView创建后）
   257→                            CookieManager.getInstance().setAcceptThirdPartyCookies(this@apply, true)
   258→
   259→                            // 加载登录页面
   260→                            loadUrl("https://passport.bilibili.com/login")
   261→                        }
   262→                    },
   263→                    update = { webView ->
   264→                        // WebView更新逻辑
   265→                    },
   266→                    modifier = Modifier
   267→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   268→                        .weight(1f)
   269→                )
   270→
   271→                // 提示信息
   272→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   273→                Text(
   274→                    "登录完成后，Cookie会自动填充到设置中",
   275→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   276→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   277→                    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
   278→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   279→                )
   280→            }
   281→        },
   282→        confirmButton = {
   283→            if (loginStatus == BilibiliLoginStatus.Success) {
   284→                TextButton(onClick = onDismiss) {
   285→                    Text("完成")
   286→                }
   287→            } else {
   288→                TextButton(
   289→                    onClick = {
   290→                        // 清除Cookie并重新加载
   291→                        CookieManager.getInstance().removeAllCookies(null)
   292→                        loginStatus = BilibiliLoginStatus.Idle
   293→                        errorMessage = null
   294→                    }
   295→                ) {
   296→                    Text("重新登录")
   297→                }
   298→            }
   299→        },
   300→        dismissButton = {
   301→            TextButton(onClick = onDismiss) {
   302→                Text("取消")
   303→            }
   304→        }
   305→    )
   306→}
   307→
   308→/**
   309→ * 尝试从Cookie中提取B站相关数据
   310→ */
   311→private fun tryExtractCookies(
   312→    url: String,
   313→    onResult: (BilibiliCookies) -> Unit
   314→) {
   315→    val cookieManager = CookieManager.getInstance()
   316→    // 获取完整的Cookie（从.bilibili.com域）
   317→    val cookies = cookieManager.getCookie(url) ?: cookieManager.getCookie("https://www.bilibili.com")
   318→
   319→    var sessdata: String? = null
   320→    var biliJct: String? = null
   321→    var dedeUserID: String? = null
   322→
   323→    // 构建完整Cookie字符串（包含所有字段）
   324→    val fullCookieBuilder = StringBuilder()
   325→    val cookiePairs = mutableListOf<Pair<String, String>>()
   326→
   327→    // 解析Cookie字符串，保存所有字段
   328→    cookies?.split(";")?.forEach { cookie ->
   329→        val trimmed = cookie.trim()
   330→        val parts = trimmed.split("=", limit = 2)
   331→        if (parts.size == 2) {
   332→            val key = parts[0].trim()
   333→            val value = parts[1].trim()
   334→            cookiePairs.add(Pair(key, value))
   335→
   336→            // 提取关键字段用于验证
   337→            when (key) {
   338→                "SESSDATA" -> sessdata = value
   339→                "bili_jct" -> biliJct = value
   340→                "DedeUserID" -> dedeUserID = value
   341→            }
   342→        }
   343→    }
   344→
   345→    // 构建完整Cookie字符串（用于下载）
   346→    // 重要：buvid3, buvid4, _uuid 等字段对CDN下载很重要
   347→    val fullCookie = cookiePairs
   348→        .filter { (key, _) ->
   349→            // 保留所有重要的Cookie字段
   350→            key.startsWith("SESSDATA") ||
   351→            key.startsWith("bili_jct") ||
   352→            key.startsWith("DedeUserID") ||
   353→            key.startsWith("buvid") ||
   354→            key.startsWith("_uuid") ||
   355→            key.startsWith("CURRENT_FNVAL") ||
   356→            key.startsWith("b_nut") ||
   357→            key.startsWith("FEED_LIVE") ||
   358→            key.startsWith("LIVE_BUVID") ||
   359→            key.startsWith("finger")
   360→        }
   361→        .joinToString("; ") { (key, value) -> "$key=$value" }
   362→
   363→    Log.d("BilibiliLoginDialog", "Extracted ${cookiePairs.size} cookies, fullCookie length: ${fullCookie.length}")
   364→
   365→    onResult(BilibiliCookies(sessdata, biliJct, dedeUserID, fullCookie))
   366→}
   367→

1→package com.multilanglearner.ui.vocabulary
     2→
     3→import android.app.Application
     4→import android.graphics.*
     5→import android.os.Environment
     6→import androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel
     7→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
     8→import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
     9→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.AIService
    10→import com.multilanglearner.data.repository.FavoriteRepository
    11→import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
    12→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    14→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    16→import java.io.File
    17→import java.io.FileOutputStream
    18→import javax.inject.Inject
    19→
    20→data class VocabUiState(
    21→    val words: List<FavoriteWord> = emptyList(),
    22→    val generatedImageBitmap: Bitmap? = null,
    23→    val statusText: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@HiltViewModel
    27→class VocabularyViewModel @Inject constructor(
    28→    application: Application,
    29→    private val favoriteRepository: FavoriteRepository,
    30→    private val aiService: AIService,
    31→    private val aiConfigStore: AIConfigStore
    32→) : AndroidViewModel(application) {
    33→
    34→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(VocabUiState())
    35→    val uiState: StateFlow<VocabUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
    36→
    37→    init {
    38→        viewModelScope.launch {
    39→            favoriteRepository.getAll().collect { words ->
    40→                _uiState.update { it.copy(words = words) }
    41→            }
    42→        }
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    fun deleteWord(word: FavoriteWord) {
    46→        viewModelScope.launch { favoriteRepository.remove(word.word, word.lang) }
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    fun importFromClipboard() {
    50→        // Placeholder - actual clipboard access happens in UI layer
    51→    }
    52→
    53→    /** Generate vocabulary image - ported from renderer.js renderSceneWithLabels() */
    54→    fun generateImage(words: List<FavoriteWord>) {
    55→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.Default) {
    56→            val bitmap = renderVocabImage("我的词汇", words.map { it.word to (it.translation) })
    57→            _uiState.update { it.copy(generatedImageBitmap = bitmap) }
    58→        }
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    fun aiClassifyAndImage() {
    62→        val words = _uiState.value.words
    63→        if (words.isEmpty()) return
    64→
    65→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
    66→            val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
    67→            val wordList = words.map { it.word }
    68→            val prompt = "将以下单词按语义分组，每组给中文主题名：${wordList.joinToString(", ")}\n回复JSON：[{\"group\":\"主题名\",\"words\":[\"word1\",\"word2\"]}]，只回复JSON。"
    69→            val result = aiService.chat(config, prompt)
    70→            // Parse and generate images for each group
    71→            // Simplified: just generate one image with all words
    72→            generateImage(words)
    73→        }
    74→    }
    75→
    76→    fun clearImage() { _uiState.update { it.copy(generatedImageBitmap = null) } }
    77→
    78→    fun saveImage(bitmap: Bitmap) {
    79→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
    80→            val dir = Environment.getExternalStoragePublicDirectory(Environment.DIRECTORY_PICTURES)
    81→            dir.mkdirs()
    82→            val file = File(dir, "vocab_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.png")
    83→            FileOutputStream(file).use { bitmap.compress(Bitmap.CompressFormat.PNG, 100, it) }
    84→        }
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    /** Canvas rendering - ported from renderer.js renderSceneWithLabels() */
    88→    private fun renderVocabImage(title: String, wordDetails: List<Pair<String, String>>): Bitmap {
    89→        val W = 1024; val H = 768
    90→        val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(W, H, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
    91→        val canvas = Canvas(bitmap)
    92→
    93→        // Background gradient
    94→        val bgPaint = Paint().apply {
    95→            shader = LinearGradient(0f, 0f, W.toFloat(), H.toFloat(),
    96→                intArrayOf(0xFF667eea.toInt(), 0xFF764ba2.toInt()),
    97→                null, Shader.TileMode.CLAMP)
    98→        }
    99→        canvas.drawRect(0f, 0f, W.toFloat(), H.toFloat(), bgPaint)
   100→
   101→        // Decorative circles
   102→        val circlePaint = Paint().apply { color = 0x1FFFFFFF; isAntiAlias = true }
   103→        for (i in 0 until 8) {
   104→            val cx = (Math.random() * W).toFloat()
   105→            val cy = (Math.random() * H * 0.7).toFloat()
   106→            val r = (40 + Math.random() * 100).toFloat()
   107→            canvas.drawCircle(cx, cy, r, circlePaint)
   108→        }
   109→
   110→        // Semi-transparent overlay
   111→        val overlayPaint = Paint().apply {
   112→            shader = LinearGradient(0f, 0f, 0f, H.toFloat(),
   113→                intArrayOf(0x26000000.toInt(), 0x0D000000.toInt(), 0x1A000000.toInt(), 0x8C000000.toInt()),
   114→                floatArrayOf(0f, 0.4f, 0.6f, 1f), Shader.TileMode.CLAMP)
   115→        }
   116→        canvas.drawRect(0f, 0f, W.toFloat(), H.toFloat(), overlayPaint)
   117→
   118→        // Title
   119→        val titlePaint = Paint().apply {
   120→            color = Color.WHITE; textSize = 24f; isAntiAlias = true; isFakeBoldText = true
   121→            typeface = Typeface.DEFAULT_BOLD
   122→        }
   123→        val titleBgPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xE65b7a5e.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   124→        val titleText = "📚 $title"
   125→        val tw = titlePaint.measureText(titleText) + 40
   126→        canvas.drawRoundRect(20f, 16f, 20f + tw, 64f, 24f, 24f, titleBgPaint)
   127→        canvas.drawText(titleText, 40f, 48f, titlePaint)
   128→
   129→        // Word cards
   130→        val n = wordDetails.size
   131→        val cols = minOf(3, n)
   132→        val rows = (n + cols - 1) / cols
   133→        val cardW = 300f; val cardH = 62f; val gapX = 16f; val gapY = 14f
   134→        val gridW = cols * (cardW + gapX) - gapX
   135→        val gridH = rows * (cardH + gapY) - gapY
   136→        val ox = (W - gridW) / 2
   137→        val oy = H - gridH - 40
   138→
   139→        val cardBgPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xEBFFFFFF.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   140→        val barPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF5b7a5e.toInt(); isAntiAlias = true }
   141→        val numPaint = Paint().apply { color = Color.WHITE; textSize = 11f; isAntiAlias = true; textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER; isFakeBoldText = true }
   142→        val wordPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF1a1a1a.toInt(); textSize = 20f; isAntiAlias = true; isFakeBoldText = true }
   143→        val transPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0xFF5b7a5e.toInt(); textSize = 14f; isAntiAlias = true }
   144→
   145→        for (i in 0 until n) {
   146→            val col = i % cols; val row = i / cols
   147→            val x = ox + col * (cardW + gapX)
   148→            val y = oy + row * (cardH + gapY)
   149→
   150→            canvas.drawRoundRect(x, y, x + cardW, y + cardH, 12f, 12f, cardBgPaint)
   151→            canvas.drawRoundRect(x, y, x + 6, y + cardH, 3f, 3f, barPaint)
   152→
   153→            // Number circle
   154→            canvas.drawCircle(x + 22, y + 20, 10f, barPaint)
   155→            canvas.drawText((i + 1).toString(), x + 22, y + 24, numPaint)
   156→
   157→            // Word
   158→            canvas.drawText(wordDetails[i].first, x + 40, y + 26, wordPaint)
   159→            // Translation
   160→            val trans = wordDetails[i].second.take(24)
   161→            canvas.drawText(trans, x + 40, y + 50, transPaint)
   162→        }
   163→
   164→        // Watermark
   165→        val wmPaint = Paint().apply { color = 0x80FFFFFF.toInt(); textSize = 11f; isAntiAlias = true; textAlign = Paint.Align.CENTER }
   166→        canvas.drawText("多语言视频学习 · 词汇场景图", W / 2f, H - 10f, wmPaint)
   167→
   168→        return bitmap
   169→    }
   170→}
   171→

content.text: 看了词书页面的代码，`VocabularyScreen` 本身没有"查询中"的状态显示。这个"查询中"可能来自 `FavoriteRepository` 的 Flow 数据加载。让我看看 FavoriteRepository 和 FavoriteDao。

    11→)
    12→data class FavoriteWord(
    13→    @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true) val id: Long = 0,
    14→    @ColumnInfo(name = "word") val word: String,
    15→    @ColumnInfo(name = "lang") val lang: String = "en",
    16→    @ColumnInfo(name = "phonetic") val phonetic: String = "",
    17→    @ColumnInfo(name = "translation") val translation: String = "",

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao
     2→
     3→import androidx.room.*
     4→import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     6→
     7→@Dao
     8→interface FavoriteDao {
     9→    @Query("SELECT * FROM favorites ORDER BY created_at DESC")
    10→    fun getAll(): Flow<List<FavoriteWord>>
    11→
    12→    @Query("SELECT * FROM favorites WHERE lang = :lang ORDER BY created_at DESC")
    13→    fun getByLang(lang: String): Flow<List<FavoriteWord>>
    14→
    15→    @Query("SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM favorites WHERE word = :word AND lang = :lang)")
    16→    suspend fun isFavorite(word: String, lang: String): Boolean
    17→
    18→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.REPLACE)
    19→    suspend fun insert(word: FavoriteWord)
    20→
    21→    @Query("DELETE FROM favorites WHERE word = :word AND lang = :lang")
    22→    suspend fun delete(word: String, lang: String)
    23→
    24→    @Query("DELETE FROM favorites WHERE id IN (:ids)")
    25→    suspend fun deleteByIds(ids: List<Long>)
    26→
    27→    @Query("UPDATE favorites SET box = :box WHERE id = :id")
    28→    suspend fun setBox(id: Long, box: String)
    29→
    30→    @Query("UPDATE favorites SET box = :box WHERE id IN (:ids)")
    31→    suspend fun batchSetBox(ids: List<Long>, box: String)
    32→
    33→    @Query("SELECT DISTINCT box FROM favorites WHERE box != '' ORDER BY box")
    34→    suspend fun listBoxes(): List<String>
    35→
    36→    @Insert(onConflict = OnConflictStrategy.IGNORE)
    37→    suspend fun insertIgnore(word: FavoriteWord): Long
    38→}
    39→

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.repository
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.FavoriteDao
     4→import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow
     6→import javax.inject.Inject
     7→import javax.inject.Singleton
     8→
     9→@Singleton
    10→class FavoriteRepository @Inject constructor(private val dao: FavoriteDao) {
    11→    fun getAll(): Flow<List<FavoriteWord>> = dao.getAll()
    12→    fun getByLang(lang: String): Flow<List<FavoriteWord>> = dao.getByLang(lang)
    13→    suspend fun isFavorite(word: String, lang: String) = dao.isFavorite(word, lang)
    14→
    15→    suspend fun add(word: String, lang: String, phonetic: String = "", translation: String = "", context: String = "") {
    16→        dao.insert(FavoriteWord(word = word, lang = lang, phonetic = phonetic, translation = translation, context = context))
    17→    }
    18→
    19→    suspend fun remove(word: String, lang: String) = dao.delete(word, lang)
    20→    suspend fun deleteByIds(ids: List<Long>) = dao.deleteByIds(ids)
    21→
    22→    suspend fun importWords(words: List<String>, lang: String): Int {
    23→        var count = 0
    24→        for (w in words) {
    25→            val trimmed = w.trim()
    26→            if (trimmed.isNotEmpty()) {
    27→                val result = dao.insertIgnore(FavoriteWord(word = trimmed, lang = lang))
    28→                if (result != -1L) count++
    29→            }
    30→        }
    31→        return count
    32→    }
    33→
    34→    suspend fun setBox(id: Long, box: String) = dao.setBox(id, box)
    35→    suspend fun batchSetBox(ids: List<Long>, box: String) = dao.batchSetBox(ids, box)
    36→    suspend fun listBoxes() = dao.listBoxes()
    37→}
    38→

package com.multilanglearner.data.db

import androidx.room.Database
import androidx.room.RoomDatabase
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.FavoriteDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.RegulationDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.dao.VideoDao
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.FavoriteWord
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.UserRegulation
import com.multilanglearner.data.db.entity.VideoEntity

@Database(
    entities = [FavoriteWord::class, UserRegulation::class, VideoEntity::class],
    version = 1,
    exportSchema = false
)
abstract class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase() {
    abstract fun favoriteDao(): FavoriteDao
    abstract fun regulationDao(): RegulationDao
    abstract fun videoDao(): VideoDao
}

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AI_PROVIDERS
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     7→import okhttp3.*
     8→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     9→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    10→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    11→import javax.inject.Inject
    12→import javax.inject.Singleton
    13→
    14→@Serializable
    15→data class ChatMessage(val role: String, val content: String)
    16→
    17→@Singleton
    18→class AIService @Inject constructor() {
    19→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    20→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    22→        .writeTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    23→        .build()
    24→
    25→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    26→
    27→    /**
    28→     * Call AI API - ported from main.js callAI()
    29→     * Supports Claude (x-api-key + /messages) and OpenAI-compatible (/chat/completions)
    30→     */
    31→    suspend fun chat(config: AIConfig, prompt: String): String? {
    32→        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
    33→        val preset = AI_PROVIDERS.find { it.id == config.provider }
    34→        val baseUrl = config.baseUrl.ifBlank { preset?.defaultBaseUrl ?: "" }
    35→        val model = config.model.ifBlank { preset?.defaultModel ?: "" }
    36→        if (baseUrl.isBlank()) return null
    37→
    38→        val isClaude = config.provider == "claude" || model.lowercase().contains("claude")
    39→        val url = if (isClaude) "$baseUrl/messages" else "$baseUrl/chat/completions"
    40→
    41→        val bodyObj = buildJsonObject {
    42→            put("model", model)
    43→            put("max_tokens", config.maxTokens ?: 1024)
    44→            config.temperature?.let { put("temperature", it) }
    45→            putJsonArray("messages") {
    46→                if (!isClaude) {
    47→                    addJsonObject {
    48→                        put("role", "system")
    49→                        put("content", "你是多语言学习助手。用中文回答。翻译要准确，不要音译。简洁直接。")
    50→                    }
    51→                }
    52→                addJsonObject {
    53→                    put("role", "user")
    54→                    put("content", prompt)
    55→                }
    56→            }
    57→        }
    58→
    59→        val headers = if (isClaude) {
    60→            Headers.Builder()
    61→                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
    62→                .add("x-api-key", config.apiKey)
    63→                .add("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
    64→                .build()
    65→        } else {
    66→            Headers.Builder()
    67→                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
    68→                .add("Authorization", "Bearer ${config.apiKey}")
    69→                .build()
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        val request = Request.Builder()
    73→            .url(url)
    74→            .headers(headers)
    75→            .post(bodyObj.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
    76→            .build()
    77→
    78→        return try {
    79→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    80→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return null
    81→            val jsonResponse = json.parseToJsonElement(responseBody).jsonObject
    82→            if (isClaude) {
    83→                jsonResponse["content"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
    84→                    ?.jsonObject?.get("text")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
    85→            } else {
    86→                jsonResponse["choices"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
    87→                    ?.jsonObject?.get("message")?.jsonObject
    88→                    ?.get("content")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
    89→            }
    90→        } catch (e: Exception) {
    91→            null
    92→        }
    93→    }
    94→}
    95→

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.Definition
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordCardData
     5→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     6→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     7→import okhttp3.Request
     8→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
     9→import javax.inject.Inject
    10→import javax.inject.Singleton
    11→
    12→/**
    13→ * Dictionary API service - ported from main.js fetch-examples handler
    14→ * Supports: dictionaryapi.dev (English), jisho.org (Japanese), mymemory (translation)
    15→ */
    16→@Singleton
    17→class DictionaryService @Inject constructor() {
    18→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    19→        .connectTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    20→        .readTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    21→        .build()
    22→
    23→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    24→
    25→    /** English dictionary lookup via dictionaryapi.dev */
    26→    suspend fun lookupEnglish(word: String): WordCardData? {
    27→        val url = "https://api.dictionaryapi.dev/api/v2/entries/en/${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(word, "UTF-8")}"
    28→        return try {
    29→            val response = client.newCall(Request.Builder().url(url).build()).execute()
    30→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return null
    31→            val arr = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonArray
    32→            val entry = arr.firstOrNull()?.jsonObject ?: return null
    33→            val phonetic = entry["phonetic"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
    34→            val definitions = mutableListOf<Definition>()
    35→            val examples = mutableListOf<String>()
    36→            entry["meanings"]?.jsonArray?.forEach { meaning ->
    37→                val pos = meaning.jsonObject["partOfSpeech"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
    38→                meaning.jsonObject["definitions"]?.jsonArray?.forEach { def ->
    39→                    val defObj = def.jsonObject
    40→                    definitions.add(Definition(pos, defObj["definition"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""))
    41→                    defObj["example"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull?.let { examples.add(it) }
    42→                }
    43→            }
    44→            WordCardData(word, phonetic, "", definitions.take(5), examples.take(5))
    45→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    /** Japanese dictionary lookup via jisho.org */
    49→    suspend fun lookupJapanese(word: String): WordCardData? {
    50→        val url = "https://jisho.org/api/v1/search/words?keyword=${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(word, "UTF-8")}"
    51→        return try {
    52→            val response = client.newCall(Request.Builder().url(url).build()).execute()
    53→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return null
    54→            val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
    55→            val entry = jsonObj["data"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()?.jsonObject ?: return null
    56→            val reading = entry["japanese"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()?.jsonObject
    57→                ?.get("reading")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
    58→            val definitions = entry["senses"]?.jsonArray?.take(5)?.map { sense ->
    59→                val pos = sense.jsonObject["parts_of_speech"]?.jsonArray
    60→                    ?.joinToString(", ") { it.jsonPrimitive.content } ?: ""
    61→                val def = sense.jsonObject["english_definitions"]?.jsonArray
    62→                    ?.joinToString("; ") { it.jsonPrimitive.content } ?: ""
    63→                Definition(pos, def)
    64→            } ?: emptyList()
    65→            WordCardData(word, reading, "", definitions)
    66→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    /** Online translation via MyMemory */
    70→    suspend fun translate(word: String, fromLang: String): String? {
    71→        val url = "https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q=${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(word, "UTF-8")}&langpair=$fromLang|zh"
    72→        return try {
    73→            val response = client.newCall(Request.Builder().url(url).build()).execute()
    74→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return null
    75→            val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
    76→            jsonObj["responseData"]?.jsonObject?.get("translatedText")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
    77→        } catch (e: Exception) { null }
    78→    }
    79→}
    80→

好，让我整理一下当前所有待处理的问题，统一修复：

1. "查询中"卡住 → `lookupWord` 中 `aiTranslateWord` 被调用了两次（一次 `launch` 一次直接调用），且 AI 服务失败时没有超时保护
2. 收藏和词书按钮重复 → 已修复
3. "打开所在文件夹"打不开 → Android 上 `resource/folder` MIME type 不被支持，需要改用更可靠的方式
4. B站登录 WebView 显示重叠 → 已修复

先修复"查询中"卡住的问题。

问题很清楚了：
1. `aiTransPromise = launch { aiTranslateWord(...) }` 启动了一个协程但结果被丢弃
2. 然后又同步调用了 `aiTranslateWord`，等于 AI 翻译被调用了两次
3. 所有网络请求都是串行的（词典查询 → 翻译 → AI翻译），任何一个超时都会卡住
4. 没有整体超时保护

修复：用 `withTimeoutOrNull` 包裹，并行执行查询，去掉重复调用。

import androidx.compose.material3.*
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

// Aurora Dark theme (极光暗色) - from styles.css :root
private val AuroraDarkColors = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFFFF6B9D),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFC084FC),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF60A5FA),
    background = Color(0xFF0A0A1A),
    surface = Color(0xFF1A1030),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onBackground = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurface = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFB0A0C0),
    outline = Color(0xFF4A3A5A),
    error = Color(0xFFF87171),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFF6B9D)
)

// Song Dynasty aesthetic (宋式美学) - from styles.css [data-theme="song"]
private val SongLightColors = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFF8B6914),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFA0522D),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF6B8E23),
    background = Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
    surface = Color(0xFFFAF6EE),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFFEDE5D5),
    onBackground = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurface = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF6B5B4B),
    outline = Color(0xFFB8A88A),
    error = Color(0xFFB22222),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFF0E6D0),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF8B6914)
)

// Font size presets (from styles.css .font-small/medium/large/xlarge)
data class FontSizePreset(
    val subtitle: Int,
    val body: Int,
    val label: Int
)

val FontSizes = mapOf(
    "small" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 18, body = 13, label = 11),
    "medium" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 22, body = 14, label = 12),
    "large" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 28, body = 16, label = 14),
    "xlarge" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 34, body = 18, label = 16)
)

@Composable
fun MultiLangTheme(
    themeName: String = "aurora",
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    val colorScheme = when (themeName) {
        "aurora" -> AuroraDarkColors
        "song" -> SongLightColors
        "system" -> if (isSystemInDarkTheme()) AuroraDarkColors else SongLightColors
        else -> AuroraDarkColors
    }

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography(),
        content = content
    )
}

content.text:
字号不生效的原因很清楚：

1. `ThemeStore` 保存了 `fontSize`，但 `MainViewModel` 只收集了 `theme`，没有收集 `fontSize`
2. `MultiLangTheme` 只接收 `themeName` 参数，没有接收 `fontSize` 参数
3. `FontSizes` map 定义了字号预设但从未被使用
4. `ThemeDialog` 中 `selectedFontSize` 初始值是硬编码的 `"medium"`，没有读取当前保存的值

content.text:
`MainViewModel` 已经暴露了 `fontSize`，但 `MainActivity` 没有收集它，`MultiLangTheme` 也没有使用它。修复链路：

1. `MainActivity` 收集 `fontSize`
2. `MultiLangTheme` 接收 `fontSize` 并应用到 Typography
3. `ThemeDialog` 读取当前保存的值

input.new_string:
@Composable
fun MultiLangTheme(
    themeName: String = "aurora",
    fontSizeName: String = "medium",
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    val colorScheme = when (themeName) {
        "aurora" -> AuroraDarkColors
        "song" -> SongLightColors
        "system" -> if (isSystemInDarkTheme()) AuroraDarkColors else SongLightColors
        else -> AuroraDarkColors
    }

    val preset = FontSizes[fontSizeName] ?: FontSizes["medium"]!!
    val typography = Typography(
        bodyLarge = Typography().bodyLarge.copy(fontSize = preset.body.sp),
        bodyMedium = Typography().bodyMedium.copy(fontSize = preset.body.sp),
        bodySmall = Typography().bodySmall.copy(fontSize = preset.label.sp),
        titleLarge = Typography().titleLarge.copy(fontSize = (preset.subtitle + 2).sp),
        titleMedium = Typography().titleMedium.copy(fontSize = preset.subtitle.sp),
        titleSmall = Typography().titleSmall.copy(fontSize = (preset.subtitle - 4).sp),
        labelLarge = Typography().labelLarge.copy(fontSize = preset.label.sp),
        labelMedium = Typography().labelMedium.copy(fontSize = preset.label.sp),
        labelSmall = Typography().labelSmall.copy(fontSize = (preset.label - 1).sp)
    )

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = typography,
        content = content
    )
}

import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp

// Aurora Dark theme (极光暗色) - from styles.css :root

    primary = Color(0xFFFF6B9D),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFC084FC),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF60A5FA),
    background = Color(0xFF0A0A1A),
    surface = Color(0xFF1A1030),
    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onBackground = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurface = Color(0xFFE8E0F0),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFB0A0C0),
    outline = Color(0xFF4A3A5A),
    error = Color(0xFFF87171),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF2A1A40),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFF6B9D)
)

// Song Dynasty aesthetic (宋式美学) - from styles.css [data-theme="song"]
private val SongLightColors = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Color(0xFF8B6914),
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    secondary = Color(0xFFA0522D),
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    tertiary = Color(0xFF6B8E23),
    background = Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
    surface = Color(0xFFFAF6EE),

    onBackground = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurface = Color(0xFF3C2415),
    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF6B5B4B),
    outline = Color(0xFFB8A88A),
    error = Color(0xFFB22222),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFF0E6D0),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF8B6914)
)

// Font size presets (from styles.css .font-small/medium/large/xlarge)
data class FontSizePreset(
    val subtitle: Int,
    val body: Int,
    val label: Int
)

val FontSizes = mapOf(
    "small" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 18, body = 13, label = 11),
    "medium" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 22, body = 14, label = 12),
    "large" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 28, body = 16, label = 14),
    "xlarge" to FontSizePreset(subtitle = 34, body = 18, label = 16)
)

@Composable
fun MultiLangTheme(
    themeName: String = "aurora",

) {
    val colorScheme = when (themeName) {
        "aurora" -> AuroraDarkColors
        "song" -> SongLightColors
        "system" -> if (isSystemInDarkTheme()) AuroraDarkColors else SongLightColors
        else -> AuroraDarkColors
    }

    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography(),
        content = content
    )
}
